description: A highly potent sativa-dominant strain from Medical Seeds Co., whose exact genetics are a well-kept secret. It's known for its intense, cerebral, and long-lasting effect that promotes creativity and euphoria. The complex aroma blends sweet, fruity notes with incense and spice.

name: 24k Gold
description: Also known as Kosher Tangie, 24k Gold is an indica-dominant hybrid celebrated for its stunning appearance and powerful citrus aroma. It delivers a happy, uplifting high that gently melts into a deep body relaxation, making it ideal for stress relief without complete mental fog.

name: 303 OG
description: Originating from Colorado's 303 area code, this indica-dominant strain is known for its classic OG characteristics. It delivers a potent, fast-acting high that starts with cerebral euphoria before settling into a deep, full-body relaxation. Its aroma is a pungent mix of earthy, piney, and diesel notes.

name: 501st OG
description: Named after the elite clone trooper legion from Star Wars, 501st OG is a potent indica-dominant strain. It boasts a sweet, fruity aroma with earthy and piney undertones. The effect is heavily physical, providing deep relaxation that can effectively combat pain and insomnia, making it a powerful force for evening use.

name: 707 Headband
genetics: (Sour Diesel x OG Kush) x Master Kush
description: Originating from Humboldt County (area code 707), this sativa-dominant strain is a special phenotype of Headband. It is known for delivering a classic 'headband' sensation of pressure around the temples, accompanied by an uplifting, creative, and long-lasting cerebral high that gently eases into relaxation. Its aroma is a pungent mix of earthy lemon and diesel.

name: 8 Ball Kush
description: A pure Indica strain derived from Afghani landraces in the Hindu Kush region. It's prized for its high resin production, making it excellent for hash. The effect is strong, deeply relaxing, and sedating, with a classic earthy and spicy aroma. Ideal for evening use.

name: 9 Pound Hammer
genetics: Gooberry x Hells OG x Jack The Ripper
description: A potent indica-dominant strain that lives up to its name with heavy, sedating effects. It has a sweet, fruity aroma of grapes and limes. The high is fast-acting, providing a strong wave of relaxation that is perfect for combating pain and insomnia at the end of the day.

name: Abusive OG
description: An OG Kush phenotype known for its heavily relaxing and sedating effects. This pure indica delivers a potent, earthy pine flavor and is often used to alleviate pain, anxiety, and insomnia.

name: Acapulco Gold
description: A legendary sativa-dominant landrace from the mountains near Acapulco, Mexico, renowned since the 1960s. It's famous for its beautiful buds that are dense with orange hairs, giving them a golden hue. The effect is highly cerebral, energizing, and euphoric, making it a classic 'wake-and-bake' strain that reduces stress and fatigue. Its unique flavor profile is often described as burnt toffee, coffee, and sweet earth.

name: ACDC
description: A famous CBD-dominant strain, bred for therapeutic purposes without strong psychoactive effects. The name stands for 'Alternative Cannabinoid Dietary Cannabis'. It has a relaxing and anxiolytic effect, while the mind remains clear. Ideal for pain and anxiety.

name: Ace of Spades
genetics: Black Cherry Soda x Jack The Ripper
description: An indica-dominant hybrid known for its sweet and sour berry aroma. It provides a relaxing and euphoric high that is great for unwinding and stimulating creativity. The buds often have a beautiful purple hue.

name: Acid Dough
description: An award-winning sativa-dominant strain from Ripper Seeds. It offers a fast-acting, euphoric, and giggly high that uplifts the mind and slightly relaxes the body. The buds are dense, dark green with orange hairs and purple trichomes.

name: Afghan Kush
description: An Indica landrace from the Hindu Kush mountains. Known for its strong, almost narcotic body effect and high resin production, making it ideal for hashish production. It has a deeply relaxing and sedating effect. Ideal for the evening and for pain or insomnia.

name: Afghan Skunk
description: A classic indica-dominant hybrid that combines the robust nature and relaxing effects of Afghani with the high yield and pungent aroma of Skunk #1. It offers a deeply relaxing body effect and is known for its ease of cultivation and resilience.

name: Afghani
description: A fundamental landrace from Afghanistan that forms the genetic basis for many modern Indicas. It offers a deeply relaxing and sedating effect that relieves stress and helps with insomnia. The aroma is earthy, sweet, and skunky.

name: Afghani #1
description: Afghani #1 is a classic, pure Indica strain directly descended from Afghani landraces, known for its robustness and high resin production. It forms the genetic basis for many modern hybrids, including the Skunk and Kush lines. The effect is strongly physical, deeply relaxing, and sedating, making it ideal for evening use to relieve pain, stress, and insomnia. The aroma is earthy and sweet with distinct notes of traditional hashish.

name: Afghani Bullrider
description: A potent indica strain believed to be a phenotype of an Afghani landrace. It delivers a deeply relaxing, almost narcotic body high that melts away pain and stress, making it ideal for nighttime use. Its aroma is a classic mix of earthy, sweet, and pungent notes. It's a parent of Ray Charles.

name: Afghani Hash Plant
description: A classic, pure indica strain selected for its incredible resin production, making it ideal for hashish. It offers a deeply relaxing, almost narcotic body high. The aroma is rich, earthy, and spicy.

name: Afgoo
description: Also known as Afgooey. A potent indica-dominant strain known for its extremely resinous, sticky buds. The effect is strongly physically relaxing, almost sedating, and leads to a euphoric, happy state. Ideal for evening use for stress and insomnia.

name: Afgooey
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid bred by Strain Hunters. Afgooey delivers a deeply relaxing body high with sweet, earthy flavors. Known for dense, resinous buds and a creeping onset that transitions into full-body sedation.

name: African Sativa
description: A general term for Sativa landraces from Africa, known for their uplifting, energetic, and cerebral effects. They are often resilient and adapted to warm climates.

name: Agent Orange
genetics: Orange Velvet x Jack The Ripper
description: Bred by MzJill Genetics. Known for its intense citrus and orange aroma. The effect is energizing, uplifting, and creative, making it an excellent choice for daytime and social occasions. Helps with fatigue and depression.

name: Agent X
description: A modern, balanced hybrid from Alien Labs (2022). Offers a complex aroma of apple, cheese, and asphalt with floral notes. The effect is strong but balanced, with an uplifting head high and a relaxed body feel. Ideal for experienced consumers.

name: AK-47
genetics: Colombian x Mexican x Thai x Afghani
description: A legendary, award-winning strain from Serious Seeds (1992). Despite the name, the effect is mellow, uplifting, and cerebral, followed by mild body relaxation. Ideal for creative and social activities. The aroma is earthy, sweet, and floral.

name: Alaskan Ice
description: An extremely potent sativa-dominant strain from Greenhouse Seed Co. Offers an immediate, uplifting, and euphoric rush that slowly transitions into a relaxing body effect. Known for its high resin production, ideal for extracts.

name: Alaskan Purple
description: A robust and high-yielding strain that develops beautiful purple colors in cooler temperatures. The indica-dominant effect is physically relaxing (Kush influence) with a cerebral, uplifting note (Sativa influence). The aroma is sweet and berry-like with floral notes.

name: Alaskan Thunder Fuck
description: Alias: ATF. A legendary Sativa from the Matanuska Valley in Alaska. Known for an intense, euphoric, and energizing rush that boosts creativity. The aroma is a complex mix of pine, lemon, menthol, and skunk.

name: Albert Walker OG
description: A clone-only indica-dominant hybrid with mysterious origins, though it's believed to be a phenotype of Afghan Skunk. It is known for its potent, long-lasting effects that are both euphoric and deeply relaxing. The aroma is a pungent mix of skunk, lemon, and diesel.

name: Alien Cookies
description: A potent and well-regarded hybrid, best known as a parent of the modern superstar Cap Junky. This strain combines the sweet, earthy, and vanilla notes of Girl Scout Cookies with the otherworldly potency and unique characteristics of Alien Dawg. The effect is strong and balanced, starting with an intense, euphoric, and cerebral rush that slowly transitions into a deeply relaxing and calming body high. The aroma is complex and enticing, with a sweet cookie and vanilla scent, underscored by pungent, earthy, and slightly chemical undertones. Due to its potency, it is best suited for experienced consumers.

name: Alien Dawg
description: A pure Indica, known for its sour, diesel-like aroma and its potent, relaxing effects. It's a parent of Alien Kush and offers a strong cerebral effect that transitions into a deep body relaxation.

name: Alien Kush
description: A balanced hybrid with a spicy, earthy, and piney aroma. It offers a clear, cerebral effect that transitions into a gentle body relaxation. Known for its 'alien-like' effect that can slightly alter perception.

name: Alien OG
description: Also known as Alien OG Kush. A highly potent hybrid known for its intense, almost psychedelic cerebral rush combined with a heavy body effect. Ideal for experienced consumers. The aroma is a classic OG blend of lemon, pine, and earth.

name: Alien Rock Candy
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a sweet, candy-like flavor profile complemented by sour and earthy notes. The effect is strongly relaxing and sedating, ideal for relieving pain, stress, and insomnia at the end of the day.

name: Alien Tahoe OG
genetics: Tahoe OG Kush x Alien Kush

name: Alien Technology
description: A pure indica landrace strain reportedly brought back from Afghanistan by a US soldier. It is known for its strong, sedating effects and its high resin production.

name: Alpha OG
description: A potent phenotype of OG Kush, known for its strong, relaxing effects that are both euphoric and calming. It's one of the parent strains of the powerful Godfather OG. Aroma is classic OG: earthy, piney, and pungent.

name: American Dream
description: A fast-flowering, high-yielding strain from Sensi Seeds. Offers a euphoric, social, and relaxing effect without a strong 'couch-lock'. The aroma is earthy and skunky with fresh, tropical-fruity notes. Ideal for commercial growers and beginners.

name: American Sativa
genetics: Likely a mix of Central American landraces
description: A term for early Sativa hybrids developed in the USA, often from Central and South American genetics. Known for uplifting and energetic effects. It is a parent of Nebula.

name: Amnesia
genetics: Skunk #1 x Cinderella 99 x Jack Herer
description: A legendary strain made famous in Amsterdam coffeeshops. Known for a strong, cerebral, euphoric, and energizing rush. Despite the name, it promotes creativity and sociability. The aroma is earthy with sweet citrus notes.

name: Amnesia Haze
genetics: Southeast Asian x Jamaican Haze x Afghani/Hawaiian
description: A multiple Cannabis Cup winner, famous for its potent, long-lasting, and almost psychedelic cerebral effect. Promotes energy, euphoria, and creativity. The aroma is a complex blend of lemon, citrus, earth, and spices.

name: Amnesia Lemon
description: An award-winning strain (Cannabis Cup 2004) known for its intense citrus and lemon flavor. The effect is uplifting, cerebral, and energizing, typical of a sativa, but with a relaxing physical component. Ideal for daytime use.

name: Animal Cookies
description: A potent, indica-dominant hybrid that provides a heavy full-body relaxation, ideal for treating pain and insomnia. It has a sweet, sour aroma with heavy, earthy notes.

name: Animal Mints
description: Bred by Seed Junky Genetics. A highly potent hybrid with a complex aroma of mint, cookie dough, vanilla, and a hint of diesel. The effect is strong and balanced, starting with a euphoric head high that transitions into a deep, sedating body relaxation.

name: Appalachia
description: A potent hybrid with an earthy, sweet, and slightly spicy aroma. It offers a balanced effect and is the parent of Bay 11.

name: Appalachian Kush
description: A potent hybrid with an earthy, sweet, and slightly spicy aroma. It offers a balanced effect, starting with a cerebral, energetic boost and settling into a relaxing body effect. Ideal for relieving stress and pain without being completely sedating.

name: Apple Betty
description: A potent hybrid with a delicious flavor profile reminiscent of baked apple pie with cinnamon and chocolate notes. The effect is fast-acting, euphoric, and giggly, almost psychedelic, followed by a deep body relaxation.

name: Apple Cobbler
description: A balanced hybrid with a fruity, tart flavor profile of apple and earth. The effect is a creeper, starting with a cerebral lift that boosts mood and creativity, and transitioning into a calming body relaxation. Great for stress and pain relief.

name: Apple Fritter
description: An extremely potent hybrid known for its high THC content and its delicious flavor of sweet apple pastry. The effect is strong and balanced, starting with a euphoric and creative rush that transitions into a deeply relaxing body effect.

name: Apple Jack
description: A potent hybrid that offers uplifting and soothing effects. Great for treating chronic pain or nausea. The flavor profile is skunky and earthy with undertones of sliced apple. The sativa-dominant effect is energizing and creative.

name: Apples and Bananas
genetics: (Platinum Cookies x Granddaddy Purple) x (Blue Power) x Gelatti
description: Bred by Compound Genetics & Cookies. Offers a complex fruit aroma of apples, bananas, cherries, and spices. The effect is balanced and potent, leading to a happy and relaxed feeling that soothes the body but keeps the mind active. Perfect for the afternoon.

name: Apricot Helix
description: Bred by Exotic Genetix, Apricot Helix is an indica-dominant hybrid known for its sweet and fruity apricot aroma with earthy undertones. It delivers a deeply relaxing and euphoric high that is great for unwinding. It's a parent of the popular Orange Apricot strain.

name: Atlas Star
genetics: Sensi Star x an unknown Dutch indica
description: A balanced hybrid known for its sweet, fruity aroma and well-rounded effects. It provides a euphoric and happy high that gently relaxes the body without being overly sedating, making it a good choice for various occasions.

name: Atomic Apple
description: A balanced hybrid from Alien Labs. It combines the minty, earthy flavor of Triangle Mints with the sweet apple pastry of Apple Fritter. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing, suitable for all-day use.

name: Aurora Indica
description: Bred by Nirvana Seeds. A potent F1 hybrid that produces heavy full-body effects and a sedating cerebral calm. Ideal for evening treatment of insomnia and pain. The plants are short, stout, and produce dense, resinous buds.

name: Australian Sativa
description: Australian Sativa is a landrace strain that has adapted to the climate of Australia. It is primarily known as the genetic origin of the 'DucksFoot' mutation, characterized by its unusual webbed leaves. The effect is typical of a sativa: uplifting, energetic, and creative, making it a good choice for daytime use. The aroma is earthy and piney with spicy and sweet notes.

name: Auto Cookies USA
description: This autoflowering version transplants the coveted dessert genetics of the US West Coast into a lightning-fast agronomic format without sacrificing terpene density. Auto Cookies USA is ideal for growers who prefer rapid cycles while still seeking the deep sweetness and physical relaxation of the original Cookies lines. The plant remains extremely compact yet highly productive relative to its size.

name: Auto Duck
genetics: Frisian Duck x Auto White Widow
description: A unique 'stealth' strain from Dutch Passion with a natural leaf mutation (duck's foot shape) that makes it inconspicuous. The smell is subtle. The effect is balanced and moderate, ideal for daytime use. Very robust and easy to grow.

name: Auto White Widow
description: The autoflowering version of the legendary White Widow. It retains the potent, balanced effect and spicy-earthy aroma of the original, but grows faster and easier. Ideal for beginners.

name: Ayahuasca Purple
genetics: Red River Delta x Master Kush
description: A pure Indica from Barney's Farm, known for its stunning purple and ruby red colors. The effect is deeply relaxing, calming, and can have psychedelic qualities. The aroma is exotic with notes of hazelnut and papaya. Very high yielding.

name: B-52
description: A Skunk hybrid known for its large, dense buds and high yields. The effect is balanced, starting with a cerebral, uplifting feeling that transitions into a gentle body relaxation. The aroma is sweet and skunky.

name: Bacio Gelato (Gelato #41)
genetics: Sunset Sherbet x Thin Mint GSC
description: Bacio Gelato is the phenotype #41 of the original Gelato. It is renowned for its heavy, relaxing high and a rich, creamy, and sweet flavor profile with notes of berries and earth. Unlike some other Gelato phenotypes that can be more uplifting, Bacio Gelato is known for its potent, full-bodied effects that are deeply calming, making it an excellent choice for evening use to relieve stress and pain.

name: Bahama Mama
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid known for its tropical, fruity aroma and uplifting effects. It provides an energetic and euphoric high perfect for daytime use, with a flavor profile reminiscent of passionfruit and citrus. The plant is visually striking with vibrant colors.

name: Banana
description: A strain of unknown origin, famous for its distinct banana aroma and flavor, which it passes on to its descendants like Banana OG.

name: Banana Cream Cake
description: Through the global tissue culture initiative by Seed Junky Genetics and Segra, this strain has grown into a reliable industrial standard. It offers extremely heavy yields and agronomic stability resistant to common viroids. The flavor combines sweet, creamy banana notes with a penetrating gasoline sharpness that culminates in narcotic relaxation.

name: Banana Fire Cookies
genetics: (Fire OG x Girl Scout Cookies) x Banana OG
description: Banana Fire Cookies is a potent, indica-dominant hybrid strain known for its intense aroma and flavor profile. It combines the sweet, tropical banana notes of Banana OG with the earthy potency of Fire OG and the complex sweetness of GSC. The effect is strongly relaxing and euphoric, ideal for evening use to relieve stress and promote relaxation.

name: Banana Kush
description: A West Coast legend, famous for its distinct taste and smell of fresh bananas. This indica-dominant hybrid offers a mellow, euphoric effect that boosts creativity while relaxing the body without being overly sedating.

name: Banana OG
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with an aroma of overripe bananas and earthy pine notes. The effect is strong and creeps up, leading to deep physical relaxation and can be heavily sedating in higher doses. Ideal for evening use.

name: Bangi Haze
description: A classic sativa from ACE Seeds, known for its resistance to cold and mold. It delivers a clean, energetic, and focused cerebral high without paranoia. The aroma is sweet and floral with hints of anise and lemon.

name: Bay 11
description: An award-winning sativa strain known for its dense, crystal-coated buds and uplifting, creative high. It is a parent of Bay Platinum Cookies.

name: Bay Platinum Cookies
description: A potent hybrid known for its dense, resinous buds with a sweet, earthy aroma. It combines the euphoric effects of Bay 11 with the relaxing power of Platinum GSC, offering a balanced, strong effect.

name: BC Bud
description: An umbrella term for high-quality cannabis from British Columbia, Canada. It often refers to a specific hybrid that offers a balanced, relaxing effect. The aroma is typically earthy and sweet with notes of pine.

name: Bedica (Talea)
description: A standardized medicinal cannabis strain grown by Bedrocan in the Netherlands. It is an Indica strain known for its relaxing and pain-relieving properties, often used to treat chronic pain and spasticity.

name: Bediol (Elida)
description: A medicinal cannabis strain from Bedrocan with a balanced THC and CBD content. It offers a mild, clear effect without strong psychoactivity and is ideal for patients seeking the therapeutic benefits of both cannabinoids.

name: Bedrocan (Afina)
description: The flagship strain from Bedrocan, known for its high THC content and consistent quality. It is a Sativa strain (Jack Herer phenotype) that provides a strong, uplifting, and energizing effect. Widely used in medical programs.

name: Bedrolite (Rensina)
description: A medicinal cannabis strain from Bedrocan that contains almost exclusively CBD. It has no psychoactive effects and is used to treat conditions like epilepsy, inflammation, and anxiety disorders.

name: Berry Gelato
description: Berry Gelato is an indica-dominant hybrid that combines the legendary genetics of Thin Mint GSC (a key part of the Gelato lineage) and the classic Blueberry. The result is a strain with a delicious flavor profile of sweet, fruity berries and a creamy, dessert-like finish. The effects typically begin with a happy and uplifting cerebral rush that melts away stress, which is gradually followed by a deeply relaxing and calming body high that soothes muscles without being completely sedating.

name: Big Bud
genetics: Afghani x Northern Lights x Skunk #1
description: Big Bud is a legendary, award-winning Indica strain known, as its name suggests, for its massive, heavy buds and extremely high yields. The effect is deeply relaxing and physical, typical of a strong Indica, making it ideal for relieving stress, pain, and insomnia in the evening. The aroma is sweet, earthy, and fruity with spicy undertones.

name: Big Skunk Korean
genetics: Big Bud x Skunk #1 x Korean Sativa

name: Biker Kush
description: A potent indica-dominant strain from Karma Genetics. It delivers a heavy, relaxing body high that is great for pain relief and insomnia. The aroma is a classic OG profile with pungent notes of lemon, pine, and diesel fuel.

name: Birthday Cake Kush
genetics: Girl Scout Cookies x Cherry Pie
description: Also known as Birthday Cake. A potent indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, vanilla, and earthy aroma. The effect is highly relaxing and euphoric, ideal for relieving pain, anxiety, and insomnia. A perfect 'dessert' smoke.

name: Biscotti
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with the taste of sweet, nutty cookies with a hint of diesel. The effect is cerebral and euphoric, followed by a deeply relaxing body high. Ideal for the late afternoon or evening.

name: Biscotti Mintz
description: An indica-dominant strain from Barney's Farm known for its stunning colors and complex aroma. It combines the taste of chocolate cookies with creamy mint and spices. The effect is creative, uplifting, and deeply relaxing at the same time.

name: Black Banana
genetics: Banana Fire Cookies x Black Dawg

name: Black Beauty
description: A rare, unique strain known for its dark purple, almost black leaves and its low THC content. The effect is mild and clear, ideal for consumers seeking a subtle, relaxing experience without strong psychoactivity.

name: Black Cherry Soda
description: Known for its deep purple buds and its sweet, fruity aroma of cherries and berries. The effect is balanced, starting with a cerebral, uplifting feeling that alleviates stress, followed by a gentle body relaxation.

name: Black Dahlia
description: An indica-dominant strain known for its dark, almost black leaves and its sweet, berry-like aroma. The effect is relaxing and calming, ideal for relieving stress and pain in the evening.

name: Black Dawg
description: Black Dawg is a balanced hybrid strain that combines the sweet berry aroma of Blackberry Kush with the cerebral energy of Emerald Headband (Headband line). The effect is typically uplifting and creative, accompanied by a pleasant physical relaxation. The aroma is a mix of sweet berry fruits with earthy and diesel-like undertones.

name: Black Domina
genetics: Afghani x Ortega x Northern Lights x Hash Plant
description: A potent, almost pure Indica from Sensi Seeds. Known for its fast flowering time, compact structure, and extremely resinous buds. The effect is strong, sedating, and physically relaxing. Ideal for the evening and for insomnia.

name: Black Jack
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid known for its strong, uplifting, and creative effects. It combines the cerebral energy of Jack Herer with the relaxing power of Black Domina. The aroma is a mix of pine, spices, and earth.

name: Black Runtz
description: A phenotype of the famous Runtz strain, known for its extremely dark, almost black buds and its sweet, fruity candy aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and long-lasting, with a relaxing physical component.

name: Black Tuna
description: Bred by 5 Star Organic. An extremely potent indica-dominant strain known for its pungent, diesel-like, and fishy aroma. The effect is strong and sedating, ideal for relieving chronic pain and insomnia.

name: Black Widow
genetics: Brazilian Sativa x South Indian Indica
description: Originally the same genetics as White Widow, but further developed by Mr. Nice Seeds. Black Widow is known for a strong, uplifting, and talkative effect, followed by gentle body relaxation. The aroma is sweet and fruity with a hint of skunk.

name: Blackberry
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid that balances uplifting cerebral effects with a soothing body calm. Blackberry is renowned for its striking dark purple hues and a sweet, pungent aroma reminiscent of fresh blackberries with an earthy, fuel-like undertone. It provides a happy, euphoric buzz that stimulates creativity and focus while gently relaxing muscles, making it a great choice for daytime use or social settings.

name: Blackberry Kush
description: A potent indica-dominant strain celebrated for its strong, relaxing body effects and a delicious taste that blends sweet berries with a classic Kush pungency. Blackberry Kush is often recommended for nighttime use, as it can effectively combat pain, stress, and insomnia, leading to a state of calm euphoria and deep relaxation.

name: Blackwater
genetics: Mendocino Purps x SFV OG Kush
description: A heavily indica-dominant strain known for its deep purple coloration and calming effects. Blackwater offers a sweet grape aroma with undertones of lemon and pine. The high begins with a euphoric uplift that soon melts into a full-body relaxation, making it excellent for evening use to alleviate pain and stress.

name: Blockhead
description: Blockhead by Gooeybreeder is an indica-leaning hybrid known for its remarkably dense, almost cube-shaped buds. It provides a strong, euphoric cerebral high that transitions into deep body relaxation. Sweet, earthy, and slightly fruity in flavor.

name: Blood Wreck
description: A potent sativa-dominant hybrid known for its intense, long-lasting cerebral effects. It provides a rush of energy and euphoria. The aroma is a complex mix of sweet, sour, and earthy notes. It is a parent of Timewreck.

name: Blue Cheese
description: A classic indica-dominant hybrid that combines the sweet, fruity aroma of Blueberry with the pungent, cheesy aroma of UK Cheese. The effect is deeply relaxing and calming, ideal for stress relief and pain management.

name: Blue Cookies
description: A potent indica-dominant strain that combines the sweet berry aromas of Blueberry with the earthy sweetness of GSC. The effect is strong, euphoric, and physically relaxing, ideal for evening use.

name: Blue Diamond
description: A rare, indica-dominant hybrid known for its dense, resinous buds and its earthy, sweet aroma. The effect is deeply relaxing and sedating, ideal for treating pain, insomnia, and stress.

name: Blue Dream
description: A legendary sativa-dominant hybrid from California. Famous for its balanced effects that start with a gentle cerebral high and transition into full-body relaxation. Ideal for beginners and experienced consumers alike. The aroma is sweet and berry-like.

name: Blue Dream CBD
genetics: Blue Dream x California Orange CBD
description: A CBD-rich version of the famous Blue Dream. It offers the same sweet berry aromas and high yields, but with a balanced 1:1 THC:CBD ratio. The effect is mild, clear, and therapeutic, ideal for relieving anxiety and pain without strong psychoactivity.

name: Blue Dream Matic
description: The autoflowering version of Blue Dream. It offers the same sweet berry aromas and balanced effects of the original but in a faster and easier-to-grow form. Ideal for beginners or growers with limited space.

name: Blue Gelato 41
description: A potent hybrid from Barney's Farm, known for its stunning colors and complex aroma. It combines the fruity taste of Blueberry with the creamy sweetness of Gelato. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: Blue Hawaiian
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a tropical, fruity aroma of pineapple and berries. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative, ideal for daytime use and social occasions. A perfect 'vacation' strain.

name: Blue Lobster
description: Blue Lobster (also known by the breeder name Facade) from Compound Genetics is an extreme award winner (Zalympix) that commands top prices on the modern market. The buds exhibit an uncanny density and blue coloration. The aroma pairs candied blueberries with a cooling menthol and gasoline note, culminating in a cerebrally electrifying and strongly hedonistic high.

name: Blue Magoo
description: An indica-dominant strain known for its sweet, berry-like, and floral aroma. The effect is relaxing and calming, ideal for relieving stress, pain, and insomnia in the evening.

name: Blue Mammoth Auto
description: From Barney's Farm, Blue Mammoth Auto is a robust and high-yielding autoflowering strain. It combines Blueberry Skunk with Lowryder genetics for a fast and easy grow. The effect is deeply relaxing and calming, typical of a strong indica. Its aroma is a delicious blend of fruity, sweet berries with a skunky backbone.

name: Blue Monster
genetics: G13 x Blueberry x Northern Lights #5 x Mexican Sativa
description: A potent indica-dominant strain known for its large, resinous buds and sweet berry flavor. It provides a long-lasting, deeply relaxing body high that can lead to couch-lock, making it ideal for evening use.

name: Blue Moonshine
description: An indica-dominant phenotype of Blueberry, known for its sweet flavor and fast flowering time. The effect is relaxing and sedating. It is a parent of Blue Power.

name: Blue Nerdz
description: Blue Nerdz represents the qualitative pinnacle of sweet Zkittlez offspring in 2026. The strain combines enormous trichome production with syrupy, sticky fruit aromas that amazingly accurately resemble the eponymous candy. Medically, its dense growth is used to produce fine extracts that provide deep, relaxing, and almost narcotic relief.

name: Blue Power
genetics: Sour Dubble x Master Kush x The Power x Blue Moonshine
description: An indica-dominant strain with a complex aroma of sweet berries, lemon, and earth. The effect is strong, euphoric, and physically relaxing. Known for its high resin production and beautiful blue and purple hues.

name: Blue Walker
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid that combines the fruity aroma of Blueberry with the potent, uplifting effects of Skywalker. The effect is energizing, creative, and euphoric, ideal for daytime use.

name: Blue Zushi
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity flavor profile of berries and mint. The effect is deeply relaxing and calming, ideal for relieving stress, pain, and insomnia in the evening.

name: Blueberry
description: A legendary, award-winning Indica from DJ Short, known for its sweet taste and smell of fresh blueberries. The effect is deeply relaxing and long-lasting, ideal for relieving pain and stress.

name: Blueberry Haze
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid that combines the fruity aroma of Blueberry with the uplifting, cerebral effects of Haze. The effect is energizing, creative, and euphoric, with a gentle body relaxation.

name: Blueberry Muffin
description: Bred by Humboldt Seed Company, Blueberry Muffin is celebrated for its authentic blueberry muffin aroma and flavor. It produces dense, colorful buds with purple hues and delivers a relaxing, euphoric effect ideal for evening use.

name: Blueberry OG
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid that combines the sweet berry aroma of Blueberry with the strong, relaxing effects of OG Kush. The effect is strong, sedating, and ideal for relieving pain and insomnia.

name: Blueberry Skunk
description: An indica-dominant hybrid that combines the sweet berry flavors of Blueberry with the pungent, potent effects of Skunk #1. It delivers a relaxing body high accompanied by a happy, uplifting mental state.

name: Blueberry Yum Yum
description: A strain made famous by the rapper Ludacris. It offers a sweet and fruity blueberry aroma. The effect is balanced, starting with an uplifting Sativa kick that gently transitions into a relaxing Indica effect.

name: Booger
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a skunky, earthy aroma and a hint of sweetness. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and sedating, ideal for relieving pain, stress, and insomnia.

name: Brazilian Sativa
description: Brazilian Sativa is a pure landrace that has adapted over generations to the tropical climate of the Brazilian Amazon. It is historically significant as one of the parent strains of the legendary White Widow. This strain is known for its resistance to heat and high humidity. The effect is a classic Sativa experience: a clear, energetic, and long-lasting cerebral high that promotes euphoria, creativity, and sociability without weighing down the body. The aroma is distinctly tropical and fruity, often with dominant notes of sweet mango and papaya, earning it the local nickname 'Manga Rosa' (Pink Mango). Agronomically, it grows tall and slender with a long flowering time of 10-14 weeks.

name: Bruce Banger
description: A potent sativa-dominant hybrid from Growers Choice. It combines the diesel aroma of Bruce Banner with the fruity taste of Strawberry Diesel. The effect is strong, euphoric, and energizing, ideal for daytime use.

name: Bruce Banner
description: An extremely potent hybrid known for its high THC content and its strong, fast-acting effects. The effect is euphoric, creative, and energizing, with a relaxing physical component. Named after the Hulk's alter ego.

name: Bubba Fett
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a complex aroma of spices, earth, and a hint of sweetness. The effect is deeply relaxing and sedating, ideal for relieving pain, stress, and insomnia.

name: Bubba Kush
description: Bubba Kush is a classic and highly esteemed Indica-dominant strain that gained fame in the USA in the 1990s. It is known for its profoundly calming and physically relaxing effects, often described as sedating, making it an excellent choice for relieving stress, pain, and especially insomnia. The aroma is unique and complex, with distinct notes of coffee and dark chocolate, underpinned by a sweet, earthy, and hash-like base.

name: Bubble Gum
description: An award-winning strain known for its sweet taste and smell of bubblegum. The effect is balanced, starting with a euphoric, uplifting feeling that transitions into a gentle body relaxation. Ideal for all-day use.

name: Bubblegum x Kush Mints
description: Another premium genetic from the validated Seed Junky tissue culture catalog. This primarily yield- and structure-optimized indica-dominant cross draws on sweet, nostalgic bubblegum recipes and combines them with the raw potency and minty force of Kush Mints. The result is a heavy, pain-relieving body stone with immense commercial value.

name: Burmese Kush
description: An indica-dominant hybrid known for its relaxing yet clear-headed effects. The aroma is sweet and earthy with pine undertones. It is one of the parents of Pink Panties.

name: Burmese Landrace
description: A pure sativa landrace from Southeast Asia, known for its uplifting, energetic, and clear-headed effects. The aroma is typically sweet, fruity, and earthy. It is a parent of Burmese Kush.

name: C-Vitt
description: A CBD-rich strain with a sweet, citrusy aroma. The effect is mild, clear, and functional, ideal for medical users seeking relief without strong psychoactive effects.

name: Cactus
description: Cactus is an indica-dominant hybrid strain known for its robust nature and relaxing effects. It is a cross of the classic strains Afghani and Northern Lights. The effect is typically calming and physically relaxing, making it a good choice for the evening. The aroma is a mix of pine, sweet earth, and spicy notes.

name: Cactus Breath
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid with an earthy, pine, and spicy aroma. Cactus Breath delivers a strong, relaxing, and euphoric high that is perfect for unwinding at the end of the day.

name: Cactus Cooler
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a sweet, tropical pineapple and citrus aroma. Cactus Cooler delivers an uplifting, energetic, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Cadillac Rainbow
description: This perfectly balanced hybrid combines tropical fruit excesses with the raw gas characteristics of classic lines. Cadillac Rainbow delivers sharp lemon gasoline on the inhale and cools on the exhale with sweet mint and cherry. The effect massively stimulates appetite and magnificently balances pure mental euphoria with absolute physical relaxation.

name: Cake Bomb
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, cake-like, and earthy aroma. Cake Bomb delivers a strong, relaxing, and euphoric high that is perfect for unwinding in the evening.

name: Cali-O (California Orange)
description: California Orange, also known as Cali-O, is a classic, balanced hybrid strain that has been known since the 1980s. It is famous for its intense, sweet orange and citrus aroma. The effect is clear, uplifting, and provides a happy, energetic feeling without being overly stimulating, making it suitable for use at any time of day.

name: California Indica
genetics: Cali-O (California Orange) x Afghani Hash Plant

name: California Orange CBD
genetics: Cali-O (California Orange) x an unknown high-CBD strain
description: A CBD-rich version of the classic California Orange, offering a ~1:2 THC to CBD ratio and a mild, functional effect. It is a parent of Blue Dream CBD.

name: Cambodian Landrace
description: A pure sativa from Cambodia, known for its clear, energetic cerebral high. It is a parent of Raspberry Cough.

name: Candy Bezels
description: Candy Bezels by Compound Genetics captivates with a perfect ratio of yield aesthetics and potency. The purple flowers are massively productive and exhibit an almost armor-like trichome glaze. Its old-school gasoline aroma, strongly underlaid with cool mint, induces a balanced high of cerebral euphoria and deep therapeutic physical relief.

name: Candy Jack
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a sweet, candy-like, and citrusy aroma. Candy Jack delivers an energetic, uplifting, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Candyland
genetics: Granddaddy Purple x Bay Platinum Cookies
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a sweet, candy-like, and earthy aroma. Candyland delivers an uplifting, euphoric, and creative high that is perfect for social situations.

name: Cannalope Haze
description: A fast-flowering Sativa with a sweet, melon-like, and floral aroma. The effect is energizing, cerebral, and creative.

name: Cannatonic
description: One of the first CBD-rich strains with a 1:1 THC:CBD ratio. Offers a mild, relaxing effect without strong psychoactivity. Ideal for medical users.

name: Cap Junky
description: Cap Junky is an extremely potent and highly acclaimed modern hybrid resulting from a collaboration between elite breeders Capulator and Seed Junky Genetics. This strain is a cross of Alien Cookies and Kush Mints #11 and has quickly earned a reputation as one of the strongest strains on the market. The effect is intense and fast-acting, with a powerful cerebral rush that induces euphoria, happiness, and a tingly sensation, followed by a deep but not overwhelming body relaxation. The aroma is complex and unique, often described as a mix of sour, fermented fruit and pungent diesel, with undertones of menthol, pepper, and pine. Due to its extremely high THC content, often exceeding 30%, Cap Junky is recommended exclusively for very experienced consumers.

name: Captain Morgan
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a spicy, sweet, and vanilla-like aroma. Captain Morgan delivers a relaxing and euphoric high that is perfect for unwinding.

name: Captain's Cake
genetics: GSC x White Fire Alien OG
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and spicy aroma. Captain's Cake delivers an uplifting, energetic, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Caramelo
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, caramel, and coffee-like aroma. The effect is strong, uplifting, and creative, ideal for daytime use.

name: Carbon Fiber
genetics: Biscotti x Cookies and Cream x Grape Pie
description: A balanced hybrid with a grape, cookie, and diesel-like aroma. Carbon Fiber delivers a strong, relaxing, and euphoric high that is suitable for various occasions.

name: Casey Jones
genetics: Trainwreck x Sour Diesel x Thai
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with an earthy, sweet, and citrusy aroma. Casey Jones delivers an uplifting, energetic, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Cat Piss
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid known for its pungent, ammonia-like aroma. Cat Piss delivers an energetic, uplifting, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Cataract Kush
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with an earthy, sweet, and pungent aroma. Cataract Kush delivers a strong, relaxing, and sedating high that is perfect for evening use.

name: CBD Critical Cure (Girl Time)
genetics: Critical Kush x Shanti Baba's CBD Enhanced Strain
description: An indica-dominant CBD-rich strain with a sweet, earthy, and fruity aroma. CBD Critical Cure delivers a relaxing and calming high with minimal psychoactivity, making it ideal for medical users.

name: CBD Therapy
description: A balanced hybrid CBD-rich strain with a fruity, sweet, and earthy aroma. CBD Therapy delivers a relaxing and calming high with minimal psychoactivity, making it ideal for medical users.

name: Cereal a la Mode
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, creamy, and fruity aroma. Cereal a la Mode delivers a strong, euphoric, and relaxing high that is perfect for unwinding.

name: Cereal Milk
description: A balanced hybrid with a unique aroma reminiscent of sweet milk and ice cream. The effect is calming, creative, and provides a feeling of well-being.

name: Champagne
description: Champagne Kush, often just called Champagne, is an indica-dominant hybrid known for its uplifting, 'bubbly' effect reminiscent of its namesake sparkling wine. It provides a happy, social high that settles into a gentle body relaxation. The aroma is typically sweet and grape-like with floral and earthy undertones. It is a parent of Rainbow Sherbet.

name: Charlie Sheen
genetics: OG Kush x Green Crack x Blue Dream
description: A potent hybrid that combines the best qualities of its parents. It offers a strong, euphoric, and simultaneously relaxing effect.

name: Charlottes Web
description: A world-famous CBD strain that contains virtually no THC. It was bred for its medicinal properties and offers relief without psychoactive effects.

name: Cheddar Cheeze
description: In an era of absolutely dominant fruit and candy terpenes, Cheddar Cheeze offers a highly refreshing revival of the pungent skunk and cheese profile. The strain bridges the gap between classic UK genetics and potent modern indica architecture perfectly, leading to extreme physical relaxation without completely clouding the mind.

name: Cheese
description: A famous phenotype of Skunk #1 that originated in the UK. Known for its unique, pungent cheese aroma and a balanced, relaxing effect.

name: Cheese Haze
description: A hybrid that combines the pungent cheese aroma of Cheese with the uplifting effect of Haze. Ideal for experienced consumers seeking a strong cerebral effect.

name: Cheese Quake
description: An indica-dominant strain with a pungent cheese and sweet grape aroma. The effect is deeply relaxing and calming. It is a parent of Secret Weapon.

name: Cheesecake
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, cheesy, and earthy aroma. Cheesecake delivers a strong, relaxing, and euphoric high that is perfect for unwinding.

name: Cheetah Piss
genetics: Lemonnade x Gelato 42 x London Poundcake 97
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a pungent, ammonia-like, and citrusy aroma. Cheetah Piss delivers an energetic, uplifting, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Chem Sis
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a pungent, diesel-like, and earthy aroma. Chem Sis delivers an energetic, uplifting, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Chemdawg
description: Chemdawg, often spelled Chemdog, is a legendary hybrid with a mysterious origin, serving as the genetic cornerstone for countless modern classics like OG Kush and Sour Diesel. Its origin story is shrouded in myth, but the most popular theory suggests the strain originated from seeds acquired at a Grateful Dead concert in 1991. Its effect is strongly cerebral, uplifting, and creative, but it quickly transitions into a noticeable physical relaxation without being fully sedating. Its aroma is its most distinctive feature: an extremely sharp, pungent smell of diesel, chemicals, and earthy pine, which became known as 'gas' or 'fuel' and defined an entire category of flavor profiles. Due to its potency and unique terpene profile, it is a strain better suited for experienced consumers.

name: Chemdawg 4
description: Known as the 'Chem #4' cut, this is a more indica-leaning phenotype of the legendary Chemdawg. It delivers a potent, relaxing body high with a cerebral, euphoric onset. The aroma is a classic mix of diesel, pine, and lemon. It is a parent of Stardawg.

name: Chemdawg 91
description: One of the original and most potent phenotypes of the Chemdawg line. Known for its extremely pungent, diesel-like aroma and a strong, cerebral effect that transitions into deep body relaxation. A legendary strain that served as a parent for many famous hybrids like OG Kush and Sour Diesel.

name: Chemdawg Sour Diesel
description: Chemdawg Sour Diesel is a phenotype that emphasizes the most potent characteristics of its parent strains. It is known for its extremely pungent diesel and sour citrus aroma. This sativa-dominant strain delivers a fast-acting, energetic, and dreamy cerebral high, perfect for daytime use to boost creativity and focus. It is a parent of Grape Stomper.

name: Chemdog Millionaire
description: A potent hybrid with a lemony, diesel-like, and earthy aroma. Chemdog Millionaire delivers a strong, euphoric, and relaxing high that is perfect for unwinding.

name: Chem's Sister
description: Chem's Sister is one of the original Chemdawg phenotypes from the legendary 1991 Grateful Dead lot seeds. She produces a potent, cerebral, uplifting high with intense diesel and chemical aromas. A cornerstone in breeding, including the creation of GG4.

name: Cherry AK-47
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a sweet, cherry-like, and earthy aroma. Cherry AK-47 delivers an uplifting, creative, and energetic high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Cherry Pie
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, cherry-like, and earthy aroma. Cherry Pie delivers a relaxing and happy high that is perfect for unwinding.

name: Cherry Wine
description: A high-CBD strain known for its sweet cherry and black pepper aroma. It produces calming and relaxing effects without any psychoactive high, making it popular for therapeutic use. It is a parent of Trophy Wife.

name: Chimera #2
description: Chimera #2 is a highly potent and sought-after hybrid strain from BeLeaf Cannabis. Known for its complex aroma profile blending port wine, citrus, and gassy notes. The effect is potent, offering a euphoric and creative high that settles into a comfortable body relaxation. It is a parent of Permanent Chimera.

name: Chiquita Banana
description: A potent hybrid with a sweet, fruity banana aroma. Chiquita Banana delivers a strong, euphoric, and relaxing high that is perfect for unwinding.

name: Chocolate Diesel
description: Chocolate Diesel is a potent sativa-dominant hybrid, famous for its unique and complex aroma profile that blends pungent diesel with rich notes of coffee and dark chocolate. This strain is a genetic parent to the legendary Original Glue (GG4). It delivers a powerful, fast-acting cerebral high that is uplifting, energetic, and euphoric, making it a great choice for daytime use to combat fatigue and stimulate creativity. Due to its strong effects, it's best suited for experienced consumers.

name: Chocolate Kush
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a delicious aroma of sweet chocolate, coffee, and earth. The effect is deeply relaxing and calming, making it a great choice for evening use. It is a parent of Truffle Butter.

name: Chocolate Thai
description: A legendary landrace sativa from the 1960s, famous for its unique chocolate and coffee-like aroma. The effect is purely cerebral, energizing, and creative, but without the sometimes overwhelming rush of other sativas. Due to its long flowering time and low yield, it is rarely found in its pure form today.

name: Chocolope
description: An almost pure Sativa known for its unique, delicious aroma of chocolate and coffee. The effect is highly energizing, euphoric, and cerebral, making it a perfect 'wake-and-bake' strain that lifts creativity and mood.

name: Cinderella 99
description: Also known as Cindy 99. A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, tropical aroma. It offers a dreamy, uplifting, and creative effect.

name: Citradelic Sunset
genetics: Ghost Train Haze x Mandarin Sunset
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a strong citrusy, orangey, and sweet aroma. Citradelic Sunset delivers an energetic, uplifting, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Citral
description: Citral by Nirvana Seeds is a potent indica bred from Pakistani landrace genetics. Named after citral, the terpene responsible for its strong lemon scent. It delivers a heavy body stone with calming, sleep-inducing effects. Compact plant structure makes it ideal for SOG setups.

name: Citral #13
description: A potent phenotype of the Citral strain, known for its strong citrus and skunky aroma. The effect is relaxing and euphoric. It is a parent of Papaya.

name: Colombian
description: A classic Sativa landrace from the mountains of Santa Marta in Colombia. It is one of the parents of Skunk #1 and is known for its uplifting, energizing, and clear-headed effects without paranoia. The aroma is a sweet mix of citrus, lime, and skunk.

name: Colombian Gold
description: A legendary landrace sativa from the Santa Marta mountains of Colombia. Colombian Gold was one of the most sought-after strains in the 1970s. It delivers a clear-headed, uplifting, and energetic high. A foundational parent in strains like Skunk #1 and Haze.

name: Colt 45
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with an earthy, piney, and woody aroma. Colt 45 delivers an energetic, uplifting, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Congo
genetics: Congo Pointe Noire x Congo #3 x Bangi Haze
description: A pure Sativa with a sweet, fruity, and earthy aroma. Congo delivers an energetic, uplifting, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Congo #3
description: Congo #3 is a specific phenotype of Congolese landrace, likely selected for certain desirable traits. It is one of the parents of the Congo strain. It provides a classic sativa high: clear, energetic, and uplifting with a spicy, fruity aroma.

name: Congo Pointe Noire
description: A pure sativa landrace from the Pointe-Noire region of the Republic of Congo. Known for its energetic, long-lasting cerebral high that stimulates creativity. It has a fruity, spicy, and earthy aroma and is a parent of the Congo strain.

name: Cookie Monster
description: An award-winning indica-dominant hybrid. It delivers a powerful, relaxing, and sleepy high, true to its OG and Cookies lineage. The aroma is sweet and minty with woody, earthy undertones. It is a parent of Pineapple Upside Down Cake.

name: Cookies and Cream
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, vanilla-like, and nutty aroma. Cookies and Cream delivers a strong, euphoric, and relaxing high that is suitable for various occasions.

name: Cookies Kush
description: An award-winning indica-dominant hybrid from Barney's Farm. It combines the sweet minty flavor of GSC with the potent effects of OG Kush. The effect is strong, relaxing, and happy.

name: Cosmic Charlie
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a highly psychedelic and creative effect. The aroma is a mix of citrus, sweetness, and earthy notes.

name: Critical Kush
description: Critical Kush by Barney's Farm combines the heavy yields of Critical Mass with the potency and flavor complexity of OG Kush. This pure indica delivers a powerful body stone with earthy, spicy flavors. Popular among medical users for pain and insomnia relief.

name: Critical Mass
description: An indica-dominant strain known for its massive yields and dense buds that tend to break under their own weight. The effect is deeply relaxing.

name: Crystal Locomotive
description: Crystal Locomotive is a sativa-dominant hybrid that crosses two legendary strains, Trainwreck and White Widow. It is a parent of Mendo Montage. The result is a powerful strain with an uplifting, creative, and energetic high. Its aroma is a complex mix of earthy, piney, and spicy notes, true to its heritage.

name: Dance Hall
description: Dance Hall by Royal Queen Seeds is a CBD-rich strain bred for therapeutic use with minimal psychoactive effects. The balanced THC:CBD ratio makes it ideal for daytime medicinal use. It provides a clear-headed, functional uplift without anxiety or paranoia.

name: Dance World
genetics: Dance Hall x Juanita la Lagrimosa
description: A CBD-rich strain with a balanced THC and CBD content. The effect is uplifting and functional, ideal for relieving pain and anxiety without strong psychoactive effects.

name: Dante's Inferno
description: Born from the brilliant cooperation between Tiki Madman and Clearwater Genetics, Dante's Inferno shines with impressive purple color shadings and a massive dessert terpene profile. The strain features a biphasic effect: a cerebral, creative uplift at the onset gently transitions into a deeply sedating, pain-relieving physical phase.

name: Darth Vader OG
genetics: SFV OG Kush x Larry OG
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with an earthy, sweet aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and sedating, ideal for evening use and for insomnia.

name: Deadhead OG
description: A sativa-dominant strain with an earthy, piney, and slightly sour aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing, ideal for daytime use.

name: Death Bubba
description: A potent indica-dominant strain known for its heavily sedating and sleep-inducing effects. Ideal for evening use for severe pain or insomnia.

name: Death Star
description: An indica-dominant strain with a pungent, earthy, and diesel-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and long-lasting, ideal for evening use.

name: Devil Driver
description: Bred by cult breeder Tiki Madman, Devil Driver is a visual and olfactory magnet in any modern garden. The flowers grow tower-like and smell incredibly strong of grape candy and sweet cough syrup. The cerebral effect is bright, focusing, and excellent for social gatherings or productivity phases.

name: Diablo OG
genetics: Grapefruit x Blueberry x South African Sativa
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a fruity, spicy aroma. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative, ideal for daytime use.

name: Diamond OG
description: An indica-dominant strain known for its resinous, 'diamond-like' buds. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating, ideal for evening use.

name: Diesel
description: A classic Sativa hybrid known for its strong, diesel-like aroma. It offers an uplifting and energizing effect that is ideal for daytime use.

name: Divine Gelato
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, creamy, and fruity aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing, ideal for all-day use.

name: Do-Si-Dos
genetics: OGKB (OG Kush Breath) x Face Off OG
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a sweet, earthy, and floral aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and sedating, ideal for evening use.

name: Do-Si-Woah
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, earthy, and slightly fruity aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and calming, ideal for evening use.

name: Dogwalker OG
description: A balanced hybrid with a strong, earthy, and skunky aroma. The effect is strong, cerebral, and physically relaxing, ideal for experienced consumers.

name: Dolato
description: Also known as 'Do-Si-Lato', Dolato is a potent Indica hybrid. It combines the earthy potency of Do-Si-Dos with the sweet, creamy aroma of Gelato. The effect is strongly relaxing and calming, making it ideal for evening use to unwind and de-stress.

name: Donkey Butter
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a pungent, diesel-like, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, sedating, and physically relaxing, ideal for evening use.

name: Donny Burger
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a cheesy, spicy, and slightly sweet aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and long-lasting, ideal for evening use.

name: Dosi-Cake
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, cake-like, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating, ideal for evening use.

name: Double Dream
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, floral aroma. The effect is uplifting, dreamy, and relaxing, ideal for daytime use.

name: Dr. Grinspoon
description: A pure Sativa heirloom strain known for its unique, bead-like bud structure. The effect is strong, cerebral, energizing, and long-lasting. Named after the cannabis researcher Dr. Lester Grinspoon.

name: Dream Queen
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity aroma. The effect is uplifting, dreamy, and creative, ideal for daytime use.

name: Dream Star
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity aroma. The effect is relaxing and euphoric, ideal for the late afternoon or evening.

name: DucksFoot
description: A unique Sativa strain known for its webbed, duck-foot-like leaves, making it inconspicuous. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative.

name: Duct Tape
description: Duct Tape is a potent hybrid strain named for its glue-like and diesel aroma, complemented by notes of chocolate and earth. The effect is strong and balanced, beginning with a cerebral, creative rush that slowly transitions into an intense body relaxation without completely sedating the user.

name: Dumpster
description: A potent hybrid with a strong, skunky, and fruity aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: Durban Poison
description: A pure Sativa landrace from South Africa, known for its sweet, anise-like aroma and its clear, energizing, and uplifting effect. Ideal for daytime use to stay productive.

name: Dutch Treat
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, piney, and eucalyptus-like aroma. The effect is uplifting and relaxing, great for stress relief.

name: Early Girl
genetics: Afghani x Indian Indica x Mexican Sativa
description: A classic Sensi Seeds strain from the 1980s, bred for its extremely fast flowering time and resilience, making it ideal for outdoor growing in cooler climates. It produces a mild, relaxing body high with a pleasant, uplifting cerebral effect. The aroma is sweet and earthy with hints of hash. It is one of the parents of Early Pearl.

name: Early Maroc
description: A sativa-dominant strain known for its extremely fast outdoor flowering time. It offers an uplifting, clear-headed effect and a sweet, earthy aroma. Ideal for growing in cooler climates.

name: Early Pearl
description: A sativa-dominant strain developed for outdoor cultivation in cooler climates. It offers an uplifting, energizing effect and a sweet, fruity aroma.

name: Early Skunk
description: A hybrid that combines the resilience and fast flowering of Early Pearl with the potency and yield of Skunk #1. Ideal for outdoor cultivation, even in less-than-ideal climates.

name: Ed Rosenthal Super Bud
genetics: Afghani x Hindu Kush x Mexican Sativa x Thai Sativa x African Sativa
description: A balanced hybrid named after the famous cannabis author. It offers a complex, uplifting, and relaxing effect, as well as a sweet, fruity aroma.

name: El Chapo OG
genetics: Face Off OG x SFV OG x OG Kush
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a strong, earthy, and piney aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and long-lasting, ideal for evening use.

name: Electric Lemon G
description: A sativa-dominant strain with an intense lemon aroma. The effect is energizing, uplifting, and creative, ideal for daytime use.

name: Eleven Roses
genetics: Appalachian Kush x Sugar Black Rose
description: An indica-dominant hybrid known for its fast flowering time and its sweet, fruity aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and sedating.

name: Elmer's Glue
description: A potent hybrid with a strong, glue-like, and piney aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing, ideal for experienced consumers.

name: Emerald Headband
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid that combines the cerebral 'headband' effect with classic OG potency. It's known for an uplifting and creative high, and is a parent to Black Dawg.

name: Emergen-C
genetics: Orange Push Pop x Sunset Sherbet
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a strong orange and citrus aroma. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative, ideal for daytime use.

name: Emperor Cookies
genetics: Emperor OG x Girl Scout Cookies
description: A potent hybrid with a sweet, earthy, and slightly spicy aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing, ideal for experienced consumers.

name: Emperor OG
description: Emperor OG is a heavy-hitting indica bred from OG Kush genetics. Known as a powerful nighttime strain, it delivers a sedating full-body effect perfect for alleviating insomnia and chronic pain. Dense, frosty nugs with an earthy, pine, and fuel aroma.

name: Erdpurt
description: A Swiss outdoor strain known for its extreme resilience to cold and mold, and its beautiful purple colors. It offers a mild, relaxing, and functional high with notable CBD content. The aroma is a sweet mix of strawberry and earth. It is a parent of the CBD strain Imperial Lion.

name: Ethos Glue
description: From Ethos Genetics, this is a refined version of the legendary Gorilla Glue #4. It's known for its extreme resin production and a potent, balanced high that is both euphoric and deeply relaxing. The aroma is a classic 'glue' profile of pungent diesel, chocolate, and earth. It's a parent of Zour Apples.

name: Ewok
genetics: Albert Walker OG x Tahoe Alien
description: An indica-dominant strain with a fruity, citrusy aroma. The effect is relaxing and calming, ideal for relieving stress and anxiety.

name: Exodus Cheese
description: The original Cheese phenotype, known for its extremely pungent, cheese-like aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and physically relaxing.

name: F1 Hybrid
description: This is a placeholder representing the concept of an 'F1 Hybrid,' which is the first filial generation cross between two distinct parent strains. F1 hybrids are prized for their 'hybrid vigor' (heterosis), often resulting in increased growth, yield, and stability. This entry serves as a genealogical placeholder.

name: Face Off OG
description: An extremely potent indica-dominant strain, known for its heavily sedating and physically relaxing effects. Ideal for evening use and for severe pain or insomnia.

name: Fat Banana
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity banana aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating, ideal for evening use.

name: Fire Alien Kush
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a complex aroma of lemon, spice, and diesel. The effect is strong, starting with a cerebral rush that evolves into a deep, relaxing body high.

name: Fire OG
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with an earthy, piney, and citrusy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and long-lasting, ideal for evening use.

name: Florida Kush
genetics: Triangle Kush x an unknown strain
description: A potent indica-dominant strain originating from Florida, closely related to OG Kush and Triangle Kush. It delivers a strong, relaxing, and euphoric high. The aroma is a classic OG profile of pine, earth, and lemon. It is one of the parents of Pink Panties.

name: Forbidden Fruit
description: An indica-dominant strain with an exotic, fruity aroma of cherry, passionfruit, and citrus. The effect is strong, relaxing, and euphoric.

name: Frankenstein
description: An indica-dominant strain with an earthy, citrusy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating, ideal for evening use.

name: Freakshow
description: A unique strain bred by Humboldt Seed Co., known for its unusual, fern-like leaf structure that makes it a 'stealth' plant. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing. Ideal for daytime use.

name: French Toast
genetics: Paris OG x Face Off OG
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, buttery, and slightly spicy aroma. The effect is relaxing and calming, ideal for evening use.

name: Frisian Dew
description: An award-winning strain specifically developed for outdoor cultivation in cooler climates. It is highly resistant to mold and often develops beautiful purple hues.

name: Frisian Duck
description: A unique 'stealth' strain with webbed, duck-foot-like leaves, making it inconspicuous. The effect is uplifting and clear, ideal for daytime use.

name: Frosted Guava
description: A potent hybrid with a sweet, fruity aroma of guava and tropical fruits. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: Fruity Pebbles OG
genetics: Green Ribbon x Granddaddy Purple x Tahoe Alien
description: A hybrid known for its sweet, fruity aroma reminiscent of the breakfast cereal of the same name. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: Future #1
description: An extremely potent hybrid known for its incredibly high THC content. The effect is strong, psychedelic, and long-lasting, recommended only for experienced consumers.

name: G13
description: A legendary Indica strain with a mysterious origin story. It offers a strong, physically relaxing, and cerebrally stimulating effect.

name: G13 Haze
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid that crosses the legendary G13 with a Hawaiian Sativa. It offers a powerful, uplifting cerebral high that's both creative and energetic, making it great for daytime use. The flavor is a complex mix of fruity, sweet, and spicy notes.

name: Galactica OG
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid with a coffee-like and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and ideal for the evening.

name: Garanimals
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet and spicy flavor profile, accented by notes of grape and earth. Garanimals delivers a deeply relaxing and sedating high that is perfect for unwinding at the end of the day or combating insomnia.

name: Garlic Breath
description: An indica-dominant strain with a unique, pungent aroma of garlic and spices. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and sedating.

name: Garlic Muffin
description: An indica-dominant hybrid known for its unique savory and sweet flavor profile, combining notes of garlic and sweet blueberry muffins. The effect is deeply relaxing and calming, making it ideal for evening use to alleviate stress and pain.

name: Gary Payton
description: A highly acclaimed hybrid named after the NBA basketball player. It offers a balanced, potent effect and a complex aroma of diesel, pepper, and apricot.

name: Gary Satan
genetics: (Gary Payton x Jealousy) x Gary Satan Bx
description: Another radical modern creation by Tiki Madman that builds upon the famous Gary Payton line. Gary Satan adds massive, heavy gasoline and sherbert terpenes to the athletic profile. The effect is intense, immediately attacking the head and drifting into extremely heavy relaxation over time, making it primarily suited for evening use.

name: Gas Station Sushi
genetics: High Octane OG x Kush Mints
description: Despite its name, Gas Station Sushi delivers not fishy but piercingly sharp, highly appetite-stimulating aromas of sweet pine sap, sharp lemon, and raw gasoline. Agronomically the strain excels with light green, trichome-coated buds. It offers a strongly invigorating, clear head high that massively promotes concentration and communicativeness for daytime use.

name: Gastro Pop
description: The Gastro Pop line by Compound Genetics is distinguished by extreme anthocyanin expression resulting in deep purple, almost black flowers. Agronomically it requires high photon flux density (PPFD) to fully exploit its yield potential. The loud terpene profile combines harsh chemical gasoline notes with a dense sugary blueberry essence, producing a highly euphoric high.

name: Gelato
genetics: Sunset Sherbet x Thin Mint GSC
description: A delicious hybrid known for its dessert-like aroma, reminiscent of sweet fruits and cream. The effect is balanced, euphoric, relaxing, and creative.

name: Gelato #25
genetics: Sunset Sherbet x Thin Mint GSC
description: A phenotype of Gelato known for its fruity, dessert-like aroma. Its relaxing and euphoric effects make it a key parent of Biscotti.

name: Gelato #33
genetics: Sunset Sherbet x Thin Mint GSC
description: A famous phenotype of Gelato. Offers a balanced effect and a sweet, citrusy aroma.

name: Gelato #42
genetics: Sunset Sherbet x Thin Mint GSC
description: A sativa-leaning phenotype of the Gelato family. It offers a more uplifting and cerebral high compared to its indica-dominant siblings, making it suitable for daytime use. The aroma is sweet and fruity with earthy undertones. It's one of the parent strains of Cheetah Piss.

name: Gelato #45
genetics: Sunset Sherbet x Thin Mint GSC
description: Gelato #45, often referred to simply as 'Gelato 45', is a popular indica-dominant phenotype of the Gelato line. It is known for its strong, relaxing effects and a sweet, earthy aroma with hints of lavender and citrus. This strain is a parent to Project 4516 and Tiramisu, passing on its potent effects and complex flavor profile.

name: Gelatti
description: Gelatti is a balanced hybrid strain known for its potent effects and unique gassy, sweet flavor profile. A cross between Gelato and Biscotti, it delivers a powerful high that is both relaxing and uplifting. It is a parent to modern popular strains like Apples and Bananas and Georgia Pie.

name: Gelonade
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a potent lemon and citrus aroma. Gelonade delivers an energetic, uplifting, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use and social activities.

name: Georgia Pie
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, peachy, and creamy aroma. Georgia Pie provides a strong, relaxing, and euphoric high that is perfect for unwinding in the evening.

name: Ghost OG
description: A potent hybrid with a citrusy, piney, and earthy aroma. Ghost OG delivers a balanced high that is both relaxing and uplifting, making it suitable for various occasions.

name: Ghost Train Haze
description: An extremely potent Sativa with a citrusy, floral aroma. The effect is strong, cerebral, energizing, and can be almost psychedelic in high doses.

name: Girl Scout Cookies
description: Formerly known as Girl Scout Cookies. A legendary hybrid from California with a sweet, earthy, and minty aroma. It offers a strong, euphoric effect followed by deep body relaxation.

name: Glitter Bomb
genetics: Grape Gas x OG Kush x GSC x Blueberry Headband
description: A genetically complex indica hybrid resulting from rigorous crosses of the finest Californian classics. Glitter Bomb earns its name from the almost absurd crystal formation on its oversized flowers. The extremely high THC concentration produces a heavy, profoundly euphoric, and ultimately sedating profile perfect for late evening hours.

name: GMO Cookies
description: Also known as Garlic Cookies. A potent Indica hybrid with a unique, savory aroma of garlic, onion, and diesel. The effect is strong and physically relaxing.

name: God Bud
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, earthy, and fruity aroma. God Bud delivers a deeply relaxing and euphoric high that is often described as divine.

name: Godfather OG
description: Known as 'The Don of all OGs'. An extremely potent Indica with a sweet, grape-like aroma. The effect is heavily sedating and relaxing.

name: God's Gift
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a sweet, grape-like aroma. God's Gift delivers a strong, relaxing, and dreamy high that is perfect for evening use.

name: God's Green Crack
description: A balanced hybrid that combines the extreme energy of Green Crack with the divine relaxation of God Bud. The effect is strong and balanced, with a euphoric and focused head high accompanied by deep physical tranquility.

name: Golden Goat
genetics: Hawaiian x Romulan x Island Sweet Skunk
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a sweet, tropical, and spicy aroma. Golden Goat delivers an energetic, creative, and euphoric high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Golden Pineapple
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, tropical pineapple aroma. Golden Pineapple delivers a happy, uplifting, and creative high that is suitable for various occasions.

name: Gooberry
description: Gooberry is a potent indica-dominant hybrid, famous for its sedating effects and its role as a parent to the heavy-hitting 9 Pound Hammer. It combines the resinous nature of Afgoo with the sweet flavor of Blueberry. The aroma is a mix of berries, nuts, and earth, while the high is deeply relaxing and often leads to sleep.

name: Goofiez
description: Goofiez is an extremely energetic hybrid from Compound Genetics praised for its massive visual appeal and absurd trichome density. The plants produce dark purple flowers with bright orange pistils. The high hits rapidly, promotes uncontrollable laughter, and is medically used successfully against bipolar disorders and chronic stress without weighing down the body.

name: Gorilla Bomb
description: A potent hybrid with a diesel, chocolate, and sweet aroma. Gorilla Bomb delivers a strong, euphoric, and relaxing high that is perfect for unwinding.

name: Gorilla Butter
genetics: Gorilla Glue #4 x Peanut Butter Breath

name: Gorilla Glue
genetics: Chem's Sister x Sour Dubb x Chocolate Diesel
description: Gorilla Glue (the original, later branded GG4 or Original Glue) by GG Strains is one of the most famous and potent strains ever created. It won multiple Cannabis Cups and is known for its extreme resin production that literally glues scissors shut during trimming. Provides a heavy, euphoric, and relaxing high.

name: Gorilla Glue #4
genetics: Chem's Sister x Sour Dubb x Chocolate Diesel
description: Also known as GG4. An extremely potent and resinous hybrid. Its effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing, often with a 'couch-lock' effect. The aroma is earthy, sour, and reminiscent of diesel.

name: Gorilla Zkittlez
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and tropical aroma. Gorilla Zkittlez delivers a strong, relaxing, and happy high that is perfect for evening use.

name: Granddaddy Purple
description: A famous Indica from California, known for its deep purple colors and its sweet grape and berry aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and ideal for pain and insomnia.

name: Grandmommy Purple
description: An extremely potent indica-dominant hybrid from Herbies Seeds, known for its very high THC content. It delivers a deeply relaxing, heavy-hitting body high that is perfect for nighttime use to combat insomnia and pain. The aroma is sweet and fruity with notes of wild berries and candy.

name: Grape Ape
genetics: Mendocino Purps x Skunk x Afghani
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, grape-like aroma. Grape Ape delivers a strong, relaxing, and happy high that is perfect for evening use.

name: Grape Gas
genetics: Grape Pie x Jet Fuel Gelato
description: Grape Gas is a central foundation strain in the Compound Genetics catalog and forms the backbone of countless modern gas derivatives. It features an extremely pungent aroma profile where artificial grape sweetness blends with raw, chemical gasoline notes. The strain delivers massive extraction yields and generates a powerful, intoxicating, and profoundly relaxing body sensation.

name: Grape Gasoline
genetics: Grape Pie x Jet Fuel Gelato

name: Grape Pie
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, grape-like, and earthy aroma. Grape Pie delivers a relaxing and euphoric high that is perfect for unwinding.

name: Grape Stomper
genetics: Purple Elephant x Chemdawg Sour Diesel
description: Grape Stomper, also known as Sour Grapes, is a Sativa-dominant hybrid bred by Gage Green Genetics. It is a complex cross of Purple Elephant and Chemdawg Sour Diesel. This strain is known for its intense and sweet aroma, strongly reminiscent of grape candy or grape soda, complemented by a subtle yet noticeable hint of diesel and lemon. The effect is predominantly cerebral, fast-acting, and produces a feeling of euphoria, energy, and talkativeness. It is an excellent choice for social occasions or creative activities, as it lifts the mood and stimulates the mind without leading to heavy physical sedation. However, due to its high THC content, beginners should be cautious.

name: Grapefruit
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a strong grapefruit and citrus aroma. Grapefruit delivers an energetic, uplifting, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Grateful Breath
genetics: OG Kush Breath x Joseph OG
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid with a complex aroma of earth, fruit, and spice. It delivers a deeply relaxing and euphoric high that is said to induce a state of gratitude and calm.

name: Grease Monkey
genetics: Gorilla Glue #4 x Cookies and Cream
