description: A potent Indica hybrid with a sweet, earthy aroma with notes of vanilla and diesel. The effect is strongly relaxing and ideal for the evening.

name: Great White Shark
genetics: Super Skunk x Brazilian x South Indian
description: Great White Shark (also known as Peacemaker) by Greenhouse Seeds is a 1997 Cannabis Cup winner. This indica-dominant hybrid delivers an immediate cerebral buzz followed by a strong body stone. Known for its massive resin production and sweet, fruity flavor.

name: Green Crack
description: A potent Sativa known for its highly energizing and focusing effects. Ideal for daytime use. The aroma is fruity, citrusy, and reminiscent of mango.

name: Green Gelato
genetics: Thin Mint GSC x Sunset Sherbet
description: Green Gelato is a slightly indica-dominant powerhouse from Royal Queen Seeds, bred for maximum flavor and potency. It offers a delicious taste of sweet mint, citrus, and creamy sherbet. The effects are incredibly strong, providing an uplifting mental energy and creativity boost while simultaneously delivering a heavy, relaxing body stone. It's a top-tier dessert strain for experienced users.

name: Green Goblin
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a pungent, diesel-like, and earthy aroma. Green Goblin delivers an energetic, uplifting, and creative high that is perfect for daytime use.

name: Green Gummy
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and berry-like aroma. Green Gummy delivers a relaxing and happy high that is perfect for unwinding.

name: Green Ribbon BX
genetics: Green Ribbon x Green Ribbon IBL
description: A backcross of the Green Ribbon strain, bred to stabilize its desirable traits. It's known for a floral, earthy aroma and an uplifting, energetic high that's not overwhelming, making it suitable for daytime. It's one of the parents of Fruity Pebbles OG.

name: Green Spirit
description: A fast-flowering hybrid from Dutch Passion that combines the massive yields of Big Bud with the classic potency of Skunk #1. It offers a balanced high that is both relaxing and pleasantly euphoric. The aroma is a classic skunky and sweet blend. It's a parent of Incredible Bulk.

name: Guava
description: Guava by Cookies is a flavorful hybrid known for its tropical, guava-forward terpene profile. It delivers a balanced high combining cerebral stimulation with body relaxation. The buds are dense, colorful, and coated in trichomes with green and purple hues.

name: Guava Cake
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, tropical guava aroma. Guava Cake delivers a relaxing and euphoric high that is perfect for social situations.

name: Gummibears
genetics: Atlas Star x an unknown strain
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and berry-like aroma. Gummibears delivers a relaxing and happy high that is perfect for unwinding.

name: Gupta Kush
genetics: Ghost OG x (likely another OG Kush phenotype)

name: Gusher
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and tropical aroma. Gusher delivers a strong, relaxing, and euphoric high that is perfect for evening use.

name: Han Solo Burger
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid known for its strong, relaxing effects and a complex aroma that blends spicy, earthy notes with a pungent diesel kick. It's a great choice for experienced users seeking deep relaxation.

name: Han-Solo Hash Plant
genetics: (King x Hash Plant) x (G13 x Hash Plant)
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid known for its relaxing, heavy effects. It boasts a classic, pungent aroma profile of earth, spice, and traditional hash. It is a key parent strain of Hash Burger.

name: Harle-Tsu
description: An outstanding CBD-rich strain that produces almost no psychoactive effects. Harle-Tsu is perfect for users seeking relief from pain, inflammation, and anxiety without a high. Its aroma is a pleasant mix of earthy, woody, and sweet notes.

name: Harlequin
genetics: Colombian Gold x Nepali Indica x Thai x Swiss Landrace
description: A famous CBD-dominant sativa known for its reliable 5:2 CBD:THC ratio. Harlequin provides clear-headed, alert effects with gentle relaxation, making it excellent for daytime use to manage pain and anxiety without intoxication.

name: Hash Burger
genetics: Han-Solo Hash Plant x Double Burger
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid with a complex aroma profile blending notes of lemon, wood, and floral spice. It delivers a deeply relaxing and euphoric high, perfect for unwinding after a long day.

name: Hash Plant
description: A classic indica-dominant strain known for its high resin production, making it ideal for hash making. It offers a deeply relaxing, almost narcotic body high with a pungent, hashy, and spicy aroma.

name: Hawaiian
description: Hawaiian is a pure sativa landrace originating from the volcanic islands of Hawaii. Prized for its tropical, sweet pineapple flavors and uplifting, energetic effects. A foundational strain used extensively in breeding programs for its vigorous growth and unique terpene profile.

name: Hawaiian Sativa
description: A pure sativa landrace from the volcanic soils of Hawaii. It delivers a classic sativa high: energetic, creative, and happy, perfect for daytime activities. The aroma is a sweet and tropical blend of pineapple and citrus.

name: Haze
description: A legendary pure sativa strain, originally created by the 'Haze Brothers' in California, that is the genetic backbone of countless modern hybrids. Known for its very long flowering time and a powerful, long-lasting, energetic, and almost psychedelic cerebral high. The aroma is a complex mix of spicy, incense-like, citrus, and earthy notes.

name: Headband
description: Named for the sensation of pressure felt around the crown of the head, like a headband. This potent hybrid offers long-lasting relaxation and stress relief, combined with a euphoric and creative high. The aroma is a classic mix of diesel, earth, and lemon.

name: Headbanger
description: A potent sativa-dominant hybrid with a strong sour, diesel, and citrus aroma. The effect is highly cerebral, energizing, and creative, making it a favorite for daytime use among experienced consumers.

name: Hellcat
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid known for its sweet, fruity, and slightly gassy aroma. It delivers a powerful, relaxing high that soothes the body while providing a happy, euphoric mental state.

name: Hell's OG
description: A potent hybrid with a balanced effect that starts with a cerebral, uplifting kick and settles into a deep, relaxing body high. The aroma is a mix of sweet citrus and earthy berry notes.

name: Herijuana
genetics: Petrolia Headstash x Killer New Haven
description: A legendary indica-dominant strain known for its extremely potent, almost narcotic effects. It delivers a heavy, sedating body high, making it a top choice for severe pain and insomnia. The aroma is earthy, woody, and pungent.

name: High Country Diesel
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a strong diesel aroma and uplifting effects. It provides a surge of energy and euphoria, making it a key parent to the popular Jet Fuel (G6) strain.

name: High Octane OG
description: High Octane OG is a potent, pure indica strain known for its extremely gassy and pungent aroma. As a phenotype of OG Kush, it delivers a powerful, fast-acting high that is deeply relaxing and sedating, making it a favorite for evening use and for treating pain and insomnia.

name: Highland Oaxacan Gold
description: A classic landrace sativa from the Oaxacan highlands of Mexico. It was popular in the 1960s and 70s for its energetic, creative, and uplifting high. The aroma is sweet, spicy, and earthy. It is a parent of Purple Thai.

name: Hindu Kush
description: A pure indica landrace from the mountain range between Pakistan and Afghanistan. It's known for its classic heavy body high and a sweet, earthy aroma. A foundational strain for many modern hybrids.

name: Horchata
genetics: Mochi Gelato x Jet Fuel Gelato
description: A balanced hybrid with a unique flavor profile of peppery earth and sweet vanilla. It offers a calming and euphoric high that is perfect for relaxing without being overly sedating.

name: Humboldt OG
description: A potent OG Kush phenotype from Humboldt County, California. It features the classic OG aroma of pine, earth, and diesel. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and long-lasting, making it a favorite for evening use.

name: Ice
genetics: Afghani x Northern Lights x Skunk #1
description: A balanced hybrid, known for its extremely resinous, 'icy' buds. The effect is strong, uplifting, and relaxing.

name: Ice #2
description: Ice #2 is a select indica-dominant phenotype known for its heavy resin production and relaxing effects. It is a crucial parent strain for Papaya, contributing its sweet, earthy aroma and calming high.

name: Ice Cream Cake
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, creamy, and vanilla-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating, ideal for evening use.

name: Ice Cream Man
genetics: Jet Fuel Gelato x Legend Orange Apricot F2
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, creamy, and fruity aroma. The effect is relaxing and calming, ideal for evening use.

name: Imperial Lion
description: A CBD-rich strain with a balanced THC and CBD content. The effect is mild, clear, and functional, ideal for medical users.

name: Incredible Bulk
genetics: Big Bud x Super Skunk x Green Spirit
description: An indica-dominant strain known for its extremely high yields and fast flowering time. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Indian Indica
description: A general term for indica landraces from India, often from mountainous regions. Known for high resin production and relaxing effects. It is a parent of Early Girl.

name: Indiana Bubblegum
description: The original Bubblegum phenotype from Indiana, known for its distinctive sweet bubblegum flavor. The effect is balanced, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: Indigo Berry Kush
genetics: So G Kush x Blue Monster
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, berry-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and calming, ideal for evening use.

name: Island Pink Kush
genetics: Pink Kush x a British Columbian Indica
description: A classic from British Columbia, Island Pink Kush is a potent indica-dominant hybrid celebrated for its strong body-focused effects. It features a pungent, skunky aroma mixed with sweet floral and earthy notes. The high is powerfully relaxing and euphoric, often leading to a state of blissful couch-lock, making it highly effective for treating chronic pain, insomnia, and appetite loss.

name: Island Sweet Skunk
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, skunky, and tropical aroma. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative, ideal for daytime use.

name: Jack Frost
genetics: Jack Herer x White Widow x Northern Lights #5
description: A well-balanced hybrid known for its dense, frosty buds and a sweet, citrusy, and piney aroma. The effect is happy, uplifting, and creative, making it a popular choice for social situations and daytime activities.

name: Jack Herer
genetics: Haze x (Northern Lights #5 x Shiva Skunk)
description: A legendary, multiple award-winning sativa-dominant strain named after the famous cannabis activist. It is renowned for providing a blissful, clear-headed, and creative high that allows for activity. The aroma is a complex blend of earthy pine and spicy notes.

name: Jack The Ripper
description: A fast-flowering sativa-dominant strain from Subcool's The Dank, known for its intense lemon aroma and powerful, almost psychedelic cerebral high. It is highly sought after by Sativa lovers for its energetic and visually stimulating effects.

name: Jack's Cleaner
description: Jack's Cleaner is a sativa-dominant hybrid known for its extremely pungent lemon and pine aroma, reminiscent of a cleaning agent. The effect is fast-acting, energizing, creative, and clear-headed, making it a popular choice for daytime use. It's a parent strain to Jack The Ripper and Jesus OG.

name: Jager
description: An indica-dominant strain, often called 'Jager Kush', known for its dark purple hues and a sweet, licorice-like aroma. The effect is deeply relaxing and calming, perfect for evening use to unwind and combat sleeplessness.

name: Jamaican Pearl
description: A sativa-dominant strain developed by Sensi Seeds for outdoor cultivation in cooler, northern climates. It delivers a happy, uplifting, and social high, with a sweet and spicy tropical aroma.

name: Jealousy
description: A highly acclaimed hybrid bred by Seed Junky Genetics, named Leafly's Strain of the Year in 2022. It offers a complex sweet, fruity, and creamy aroma with a gassy kick. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing, providing a happy and balanced feeling. Ideal for all-day use.

name: Jealousy Pie
description: Jealousy Pie is a balanced hybrid that combines the coveted genetics of Jealousy with Grape Pie. The result is a strain known for its complex, dessert-like aroma and balanced effects. The high often begins with a euphoric, creative, and cerebral rush that lifts the mood before transitioning into a calming and relaxing body effect without being heavily sedating. The aroma is an enticing blend of sweet, fruity dough reminiscent of pie, combined with the earthy, sweet, and slightly gassy notes of the Jealousy line.

name: Jealousy Z
description: A potent hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and candy-like aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: Jedi Kush
genetics: Death Star x SFV OG Kush
description: An indica-dominant strain with an earthy, spicy, and slightly sweet aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and calming, bringing 'balance to the force' of your mind and body.

name: Jenny Kush
description: A balanced hybrid named in memory of a cannabis activist. It has a sweet, citrusy, and floral aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and relaxing, providing a happy, well-rounded experience.

name: Jesus OG
description: A sativa-dominant strain that provides a focused and functional high with a hint of indica relaxation. It has a complex aroma of earthy lemon and pungent Kush, offering a divine experience for productivity.

name: Jet Fuel
genetics: Aspen OG x High Country Diesel
description: Also known as G6, Jet Fuel is a potent sativa-dominant strain that lives up to its name with a high-energy, uplifting, and cerebral high. Its aroma is a pungent mix of diesel fuel and sweet skunk.

name: Jet Fuel G6
genetics: Aspen OG x High Country Diesel
description: Jet Fuel G6 (also known as G6 or Jet Fuel OG) by 303 Seeds is a potent sativa-dominant hybrid with a pungent diesel aroma. It delivers an energetic, euphoric cerebral buzz ideal for daytime use. Known for its fast onset and long-lasting effects.

name: Jet Fuel Gelato
description: Jet Fuel Gelato is a potent sativa-dominant hybrid known for its uplifting and energizing effects. It has a complex aroma of sweet diesel and floral notes. This strain provides a focused and euphoric high, making it a parent to popular strains like Horchata.

name: Jillybean
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity aroma of oranges and mangoes. The effect is uplifting, happy, and creative, making it a great choice for social gatherings and artistic endeavors.

name: Joseph OG
description: Joseph OG is a potent indica-dominant phenotype of OG Kush, known for its heavy resin production and classic OG aroma. It delivers a powerful, relaxing body high with a euphoric cerebral buzz. It's one of the parent strains of Grateful Breath.

name: Juanita la Lagrimosa
description: A pioneering CBD-rich strain from Spain, often with a 1:1 THC:CBD ratio. 'Juanita the Tearful' provides a clear-headed, functional effect with significant therapeutic benefits, making it ideal for managing anxiety and pain without a strong high. Its aroma is citrusy and hazy. It is a parent of Dance World.

name: Juicy Fruit
description: A classic hybrid from the 1970s, also known as Fruity Juice. It is famous for its sweet, fruity aroma reminiscent of tropical punch and berries. The effect is uplifting and euphoric, with a gentle body buzz. It is a parent of Orange Cream Sicle.

name: K2
description: An indica-dominant strain known for its fast flowering time and its dense, resinous buds. The effect is relaxing and calming.

name: Kali Mist
description: An award-winning, almost pure Sativa. It is known for its energizing, clear, and creative effect, which makes it the 'Queen of Sativas'. The exact genetics are unknown, but it is believed to descend from classic Sativa landraces. Ideal for daytime use.

name: Kandy Kush
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, candy-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and euphoric.

name: Kerala Gold
description: Kerala Gold is a near-pristine sativa landrace from the Western Ghats of India and one of the rarest foundation genetics. It has adapted to equatorial photoperiods and exhibits exceptional resistance to mold and mildew. The high is profoundly refreshing and cerebrally focused, accompanied by a complex aroma profile of fine sandalwood, spices, and sour floral notes.

name: Ketama
description: A pure Indica landrace from the Ketama region of Morocco, traditionally used for making high-quality hashish. It offers a relaxing and calming effect.

name: Key Lime Pie
description: A Girl Scout Cookies phenotype with a distinct lime and mint aroma. The effect is relaxing and euphoric, ideal for evening use.

name: Khalifa Kush
description: A potent indica-dominant strain developed for the rapper Wiz Khalifa. Known for its strong, lemony, and piney aroma and its relaxing, euphoric effect.

name: Kilimanjaro
description: A pure African Sativa from the slopes of Kilimanjaro in Kenya. It is known for its extremely energizing and almost immediate effect, which has earned it the nickname 'one-hit-wonder'. Ideal for daytime use to promote activity and creativity.

name: King
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with an earthy, spicy aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and sedating.

name: King Louis XIII
description: A rare phenotype of OG Kush, known for its extremely pungent, piney, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, sedating, and ideal for insomnia.

name: King's Kush
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, grape-like, and earthy aroma. The 'Grape' parent is believed to be Grape Ape. The effect is strong, relaxing, and long-lasting.

name: Kosher Kush
description: The first strain to be blessed by a rabbi. This award-winning indica-dominant hybrid offers a strong, physically relaxing effect and an earthy, fruity taste.

name: Kush Mints
description: Kush Mints is a perfectly balanced hybrid bred by Seed Junky Genetics, known for its extreme potency and unique flavor profile. It is a cross between the potent Animal Mints and the classic Bubba Kush. This strain offers a strong but balanced effect, encompassing both an uplifting, euphoric cerebral stimulation and a deeply relaxing, calming body high without being overly sedating. This makes it a versatile strain that can be enjoyed both during the day and in the evening. The aroma is complex and enticing, a blend of fresh mint and sweet cookies, underscored by earthy, piney, and coffee-like notes. Due to its high THC content, it is one of the parent strains for many modern high-potency hybrids like Cap Junky.

name: Kush Sorbet
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, creamy, and fruity aroma. The effect is relaxing and calming, ideal for evening use.

name: LA Cake
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, cake-like, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: LA Confidential
description: A famous Indica from California with an earthy, piney, and skunky aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and ideal for pain and insomnia.

name: LA Kush
description: A balanced hybrid with an earthy, piney aroma. The effect is relaxing and euphoric, ideal for all-day use.

name: La Reunion
description: La Reunion is a pure sativa landrace from Réunion Island in the Indian Ocean. It is known for its classic long-flowering sativa characteristics and a powerful, energetic, and long-lasting cerebral high. Its aroma is typically spicy and hazy. It is a key parent in the breeding of the famous Queen Mother strain.

name: Lamb's Bread
description: A famous Sativa landrace from Jamaica, reportedly Bob Marley's favorite strain. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative.

name: Larry Bird
description: Also known as Larry Bird Kush. A balanced hybrid with a sweet, grape-like, and minty aroma. The effect is relaxing and euphoric.

name: Larry OG

name: Lava Cake

description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, chocolatey, and minty aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Lavender

description: An Indica strain known for its deep purple colors and its strong, lavender-like, floral aroma. The 'Big Buddy's Lavender' phenotype is a well-known variation of this strain. The effect is deeply relaxing and sedating.

name: Lebanese
description: An Indica landrace from Lebanon, traditionally used for making the famous red and blonde Lebanese hash. It is robust and resinous.

name: Legend Orange Apricot
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity aroma of oranges and apricots. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative.

name: Lemon Berry

name: Lemon Cherry Gelato

name: Lemon Cooler

name: Lemon Haze
description: A popular Sativa with a strong, fresh lemon aroma. It produces an energizing, happy, and uplifting effect, ideal for daytime use.

name: Lemon Joy
description: Lemon Joy is a sativa-dominant hybrid known for its vibrant and uplifting effects, along with a sweet, zesty lemon aroma. It provides a happy and energetic high, making it a key parent in the breeding of Lemon Kush.

name: Lemon Pebbles
genetics: Fruity Pebbles OG x Lemon Kush

name: Lemon Thai
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a strong lemon and mint aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing.

name: Lemon Tree

name: Lemonchello

description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, lemony aroma reminiscent of the Italian liqueur. The effect is uplifting, social, and relaxing.

name: Liberty Haze
description: A Cannabis Cup winner from Barney's Farm. This fast-flowering hybrid offers a long-lasting, euphoric, and uplifting effect. The aroma is a mix of pine and lime.

name: London Pound Cake
genetics: Sunset Sherbet x an unknown Indica
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a sweet, berry-like, and grape-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and calming, ideal for evening use.

name: Lowryder
genetics: Northern Lights #2 x William's Wonder x Mexican Ruderalis
description: Lowryder by Joint Doctor is the pioneering autoflowering strain that revolutionized cannabis cultivation. It flowers automatically based on age rather than light cycle changes. Despite its small stature, it produces surprisingly potent buds. The foundation for the entire autoflower movement.

name: Lowryder #1
genetics: Northern Lights #2 x William's Wonder x Ruderalis
description: The original autoflowering strain that revolutionized cannabis cultivation. It is small, fast, and discreet, with a mild, relaxing effect. Its genetics are the foundation for a vast number of modern autoflowers.

name: LSD
description: A hybrid known for its highly psychedelic, euphoric, and cerebral effects. It is robust and high-yielding. The aroma is earthy and sweet.

name: Lucifer OG
genetics: Hell's OG x SFV OG IBL

name: MAC (Miracle Alien Cookies)
description: A potent hybrid with a complex aroma of orange, flowers, and earth. The effect is euphoric, creative, and relaxing.

name: Mac 1
description: A rare, clone-only phenotype of MAC, known for its extremely resinous buds and its strong, balanced effect.

name: Malana
description: A pure indica landrace from the Malana Valley in India, famous for producing the highly prized 'Malana Cream' charas (hashish). It is known for its high resin production and a relaxing, cerebral high. The aroma is sweet, fruity, and hashy.

name: Malawi Gold
description: A pure Sativa landrace from Malawi, known for its golden-colored buds and its energizing, almost psychedelic effect.

name: Mandarin Cookies
genetics: Forum Cut Cookies x Mandarin Sunset
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a strong orange and cookie aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing.

name: Mandarin Zkittlez

description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity aroma of mandarins. The effect is relaxing and calming.

name: Mango Kush

name: Maple Leaf
description: A classic, pure indica strain descended from Afghani landraces. It's known for its fast flowering time, high resin production, and a deeply relaxing, sedative body high. The aroma is sweet and earthy with hints of citrus and spice.

name: Marathon OG
description: An indica-dominant hybrid named after the rapper Nipsey Hussle. Known for its strong, relaxing, and long-lasting effect.

name: Marley's Collie

description: A sativa-dominant strain created by Sensi Seeds in honor of Bob Marley. It combines a sweet, tropical aroma with an uplifting, creative, and energetic high. It's a parent of Jamaican Pearl.

name: Mars OG
description: An indica-dominant strain with an earthy, sweet, and piney aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Martian

description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and berry-like aroma. The effect is relaxing and euphoric.

name: Mataro Blue

description: An indica-dominant strain known for its high resin production and its sweet, berry-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Maui Haze
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, tropical aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing, ideal for daytime use.

name: Maui Wowie
description: A classic Sativa landrace from Hawaii. It is known for its tropical pineapple and citrus aromas and an uplifting, energizing effect that relieves stress.

name: Mazar-I-Sharif
description: A legendary indica landrace from northern Afghanistan, known for its high resin production, making it ideal for hashish. The effect is deeply relaxing and sedating.

name: Meat Breath
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a unique, pungent aroma of diesel, earth, and a hint of meat. The effect is strong, relaxing, and ideal for evening use.

name: Medicine Man
genetics: White Rhino phenotype (Brazilian x South Indian x Afghani)
description: Medicine Man by Mr. Nice Seeds (Shantibaba) is essentially a renamed White Rhino, bred for its exceptional medicinal qualities. This indica-dominant strain delivers powerful body effects and is known for its massive trichome production, making it ideal for hash and extract production.

name: Mendo Breath
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet vanilla and caramel aroma. The effect is relaxing and calming, ideal for evening use.

name: Mendo Montage
genetics: Mendocino Purps x Crystal Locomotive F1

name: Mendocino Purps
description: A legendary indica-dominant strain from Mendocino County, California. Known for its deep purple colors and a grape and berry aroma. The effect is euphoric and relaxing.

name: Mexican
description: A term for various Sativa landraces from Mexico. These strains are known for their uplifting, energetic, and cerebral effects. They often have a sweet and earthy aroma. Mexican sativas, like Acapulco Gold, are a key genetic component in many famous hybrids, including Skunk #1.

name: Mickey Kush
genetics: Sweet Irish Kush x Jack The Ripper
description: A potent sativa-dominant strain with a strong lemon and pine aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing.

name: Mimosa
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid known for its uplifting, energetic effects and a sweet, tropical citrus flavor. A great daytime strain for boosting mood and productivity.

name: Mint Chocolate Chip
description: A balanced hybrid with a delicious aroma of fresh mint and sweet chocolate. The effect is uplifting and relaxing, great for any time of day.

name: MK Ultra
description: Named after the CIA's mind control program, this potent indica is known for its hypnotic, almost trance-like effects. It has a pungent, earthy, and sweet aroma.

name: Moby Dick
description: A legendary sativa-dominant strain known for its massive yields and extremely potent, almost psychedelic cerebral high. The aroma is a mix of citrus, pine, and incense.

name: Mochi
genetics: Thin Mint GSC x Sunset Sherbet
description: Also known as Mochi Gelato. A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and creamy aroma. The effect is relaxing and happy, ideal for the evening.

name: Mochi Gelato
genetics: Thin Mint GSC x Sunset Sherbet
description: Also known as Mochi, this is a balanced hybrid strain with a sweet, fruity, and creamy aroma. The effect is relaxing and happy, ideal for the evening. It's a parent of Horchata.

name: Moroccan Hash Plant
description: A pure indica landrace from the inhospitable mountain regions of Morocco, traditionally cultivated for the production of kif and fine hashish. These plants are typically short, extremely resinous, and feature very short flowering cycles adapted to arid climates. The effect is generally mild, clear-headed, and profoundly relaxing for the central nervous system.

name: Moroccan Landrace
description: A pure indica landrace from the mountainous regions of Morocco, traditionally cultivated for hashish (kif) production. These plants are typically short, resinous, and fast-flowering, adapted to arid climates. The effect is generally mild, relaxing, and clear-headed.

name: Motorbreath
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a strong diesel and chemical aroma. The effect is fast-acting, strong, and deeply relaxing, often leading to a 'couch-lock'.

name: Mr. Nice
description: An indica-dominant strain named after the famous cannabis smuggler Howard Marks. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Naran J
genetics: Orange Juice x New England Rock Candy

name: Nepali
description: A pure indica landrace from Nepal, known for its high resin production and relaxing, clear-headed effects. It has a sweet and herbal aroma. It is one of the parents of Sweet Tooth.

name: Neville's A5 Haze
description: A legendary and potent sativa-dominant hybrid, Neville's A5 Haze is a specific phenotype of Neville's Haze. It is renowned for its powerful, almost psychedelic cerebral high that is long-lasting and energizing. The aroma is a complex mix of spicy, incense-like, and piney notes. It is a parent of Tangerine Dream.

name: New England Rock Candy
genetics: Rock Candy Kush x an unknown strain

name: Night Nurse
genetics: BC Hashplant x Harmony x Fire OG Kush

name: Northern Lights #1
description: One of the original, foundational phenotypes of the Northern Lights line. A pure, fast-flowering indica known for its high resin production and deeply relaxing effects. Its genetics are a cornerstone of many modern hybrids.

name: Northern Lights #2
description: A fast-flowering and highly resilient phenotype of the Northern Lights line. It is known for its strong indica effects and piney, earthy aroma. It is a parent of the original Lowryder.

name: NYC Diesel

name: OG Kush

name: OGKB (OG Kush Breath)
description: A legendary clone considered the backbone of many modern 'Cookies' and 'Cake' strains. Known for extremely dense, resinous buds and a complex, earthy aroma with sweet and nutty undertones. The effect is potent, starting with a cerebral rush and quickly leading to a deep, almost sedating body relaxation.

name: Orange Bud
description: A classic Skunk strain with a strong orange and citrus aroma. The effect is uplifting, happy, and energizing. Easy to grow and high-yielding.

name: Orange Cookies

name: Orange Cream

name: Orange Cream Sicle

name: Orange Crush

name: Orange Eruption

name: Orange Punch

name: Orange Push Pop

name: Orange Sherbet

description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, creamy orange aroma. The effect is uplifting and relaxing.

name: Orange Velvet

name: Oreo Cake

description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, chocolatey, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Oreoz

description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a chocolatey, sweet, and creamy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and long-lasting.

name: Original Oreoz
description: Original Oreoz has garnered massive attention as the ultimate ultra-potency strain, with lab tests confirming exorbitant THC levels up to 37%. The profound aroma is reminiscent of dark chocolate, damp earth, and freshly roasted nuts. As a near-pure indica, it forces consumers into an extremely deep, long-lasting physical rest phase and excels in pain therapy.

name: Orion
genetics: Blue Mammoth Auto x Blue Dream
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity, and earthy aroma. The effect is relaxing and calming.

name: Ortega

name: Painkiller XL
description: A CBD-rich strain with a balanced THC and CBD content. The effect is mild, relaxing, and pain-relieving, without strong psychoactivity.

name: Panama Creature

description: A potent and rare indica-dominant strain known for its resinous buds and strong, relaxing effects. It is a key parent in the breeding of PCS1 (Panama Creature S1) and subsequently Cake Bomb.

name: Panama Red
description: A pure Sativa landrace from Panama, famous for its long flowering time and its energizing, cerebral, and almost psychedelic effect. A classic from the 1960s.

name: Panamanian Landrace
description: A pure Sativa landrace from Panama, famous for its long flowering time and its energizing, cerebral, and almost psychedelic effect. A classic from the 1960s.

name: Papaya
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, tropical papaya aroma. The effect is relaxing, calming, and can lead to a 'couch-lock'.

name: Papaya Cookies
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity aroma of papaya and cookies. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative.

name: Peanut Butter Souffle

name: Phantom OG

name: Pina Acai

name: Pine Tar Kush

name: Pineapple

name: Pineapple Chunk

name: Pineapple Express

name: Pineapple Kush

name: Pineapple Trainwreck

name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake

name: Pink Certz

As a multi-award-winning strain, it is prized by extractors for its massive resin coverage. The effect is remarkably clear, promoting mental focus while simultaneously relieving severe muscular tension without any lethargy.

name: Pink Kush
description: An indica-dominant hybrid, known for its beautiful pink hues and its strong, relaxing body effects. The aroma is sweet, floral, and vanilla-like.

name: Pink Panties

name: Pink Rozay
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, floral, and fruity aroma. The effect is relaxing and euphoric, ideal for evening use.

name: Pink Runtz

name: Pinkman Goo

description: A rare Indica strain known for its unique, resinous 'Goo' droplets. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Platinum Cookies

description: Platinum Cookies (also known as Platinum Girl Scout Cookies) is a potent hybrid crossing OG Kush phenotype with GSC genetics. It features a complex terpene profile with sweet, earthy, and minty notes. The effects are powerful and long-lasting, combining euphoric cerebral high with deep body relaxation.

description: An indica-dominant strain with an earthy, piney aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating, ideal for evening use.

name: Platinum Puff
description: A potent hybrid known for its frosty appearance and a sweet, earthy aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing. It is a parent of Project 4516.

name: Point Break
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, tropical, and citrusy aroma. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative.

name: Power Plant

name: Pre-98 Bubba Kush

description: The original 'Bubba Kush' from before 1998. A classic Indica known for its powerfully calming and physically relaxing effects. The aroma is a distinctive blend of earthy coffee and sweet, hash-like notes. Ideal for relieving stress, pain, and insomnia.

name: Project 4516

name: Punch Breath

name: Punto Rojo

name: Pure Kush

name: Pure Power Plant

name: Purple Candy

name: Purple Cream

name: Purple Diesel

description: A balanced hybrid that combines the best of both worlds. It offers the pungent diesel aroma of Sour Diesel along with the sweet grape notes and relaxing effects of Kush. The effect is both uplifting and cerebral as well as physically calming.

name: Purple Haze
description: A legendary Sativa, made famous by Jimi Hendrix. It offers a dreamy, euphoric, and creative high. The aroma is a mix of sweet, earthy, and berry notes.

name: Purple Kush
description: A pure Indica, known for its deep purple colors and its earthy, grape-like aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and ideal for pain and insomnia.

name: Purple Punch
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet aroma of grape candy and blueberry muffins. The effect is a one-two punch of a euphoric head high followed by a heavy body sedation.

name: Purple Skunk
description: Purple Skunk combines the vigorous growth and skunky aroma of Skunk #1 with the vibrant purple coloring of an indica parent. It offers a balanced high that starts cerebral and transitions to body relaxation. The buds display stunning purple and green hues when exposed to cool temperatures.

name: Purple Space Cookies
description: Purple Space Cookies is a sativa-dominant hybrid known for its sweet berry aroma and uplifting effects. Users report an energetic and euphoric high that stimulates creativity while providing pleasant physical relaxation. The complex flavor profile blends sweet, earthy notes with a hint of pine and fruit.

name: Purple Star

name: Purple Thai

description: A classic sativa landrace cross known for its energetic, euphoric effects and beautiful purple hues. It delivers a creative and uplifting high. It is a key parent of Purple Haze.

name: Purple Urkle

name: Queen's Sangria

name: Querkle
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet grape and berry aroma. The effect is strongly relaxing and ideal for pain and insomnia.

name: Rainbow Belts
description: Rainbow Belts is a flavor-extraction-focused indica hybrid from Archive Seed Bank that further intensifies the coveted candy terpene profile of Zkittlez through the crossing of Moonbow. The plants produce extremely sticky resin profiles perfect for premium rosin. The effect is deeply calming, profoundly euphoric, and therapeutically applied primarily against insomnia.

name: Rainbow Chip
genetics: Sunset Sherbet x Mint Chocolate Chip
description: A balanced hybrid with a complex aroma of sweet fruit, chocolate, and mint. The effect is uplifting and relaxing, great for any time of day. It is a parent of Scotty 2 Hotty.

name: Rainbow Sherbet
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and creamy aroma reminiscent of the sorbet of the same name. The effect is relaxing, happy, and uplifting.

name: Rainbow Zoap
description: LIT Farms unites in Rainbow Zoap the absolute optimum from two reigning hype families. The result is an astonishingly high-yielding strain that forms thick, purple-white shining calyxes. Flavor-wise, a sweet floral mixture permeates the rough gasoline-soap base, and the effect provides creative flights without excessively burdening the nervous system.

name: Rare Dankness #1
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with an earthy, piney, and pungent diesel aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and calming.

name: Rare Dankness #2
genetics: Ghost OG x (Chemdawg x Triangle Kush)

name: Raspberry Cough
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet raspberry aroma. The effect is uplifting, clear-headed, and energizing, ideal for daytime use.

name: Ray Charles
description: A pure Indica named after the famous musician. It offers a heavily sedating and physically relaxing effect, ideal for pain and insomnia.

name: Red Dragon
description: An exotic hybrid with a sweet, guava-like aroma. The effect is uplifting and euphoric, followed by a gentle relaxation.

name: Red Velvet
genetics: Lemon Cherry Gelato x Pina Acai
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, cake-like, and creamy aroma. The effect is relaxing, happy, and uplifting.

name: Respect
genetics: Juanita la Lagrimosa x Cannalope Haze
description: A CBD-rich strain with a 1:1 THC:CBD ratio, known for its clear-headed and therapeutic effects. It has a fruity and hazy aroma. It is a parent of Painkiller XL.

name: Rock Candy Kush
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a sweet, candy-like flavor profile complemented by sour and earthy notes. The effect is strongly relaxing and sedating, ideal for relieving pain, stress, and insomnia at the end of the day. Also known as Alien Rock Candy.

name: Rock N Rye Gelato
genetics: Lemon Cherry Gelato x Sunset Sherb BX
description: This extremely broad and partly unpredictable potency range owes Rock N Rye Gelato to its modern, unstabilized genetics. The strain breaks stress and negative thoughts through a wave of almost instant cheerfulness, followed by an extremely sedating physical phase. The complex aroma captivates with sour lemons, rich cherries, and fine pine notes.

name: Rockbud
genetics: (Super Skunk x Afghani) x Big Bud
description: An indica-dominant hybrid known for its dense, rock-hard buds and relaxing effects. It has a pungent, skunky aroma with earthy undertones. It is one of the parents of Rockstar.

name: Rockstar
description: Rockstar is a potent indica-dominant strain prized for its strong pain-relieving effects without being overly sedative. It delivers a euphoric and uplifting head high that gently transitions into deep physical relaxation. The aroma is a complex blend of spicy herbs with a hint of sweet grape.

name: Romulan
description: A pure Indica, known for its strongly therapeutic and relaxing effects. The aroma is earthy, piney, and spicy.

name: Royal Gorilla
genetics: Sour Dubb x Chem's Sister x Chocolate Diesel
description: Royal Queen Seeds' version of the legendary GG4, Royal Gorilla is an extremely potent and perfectly balanced hybrid. It is famous for its massive resin production, which makes the buds sticky and frosty. The effects are powerful, starting with a wave of cheerful euphoria that quickly melts into a deep, heavy body relaxation, effectively gluing the user to the couch. Its earthy and piney aroma is complemented by notes of lemon and diesel.

name: Royal Kush
description: Royal Kush is a potent indica-dominant hybrid known for its long-lasting, relaxing effects. The aroma is a classic blend of earthy, skunky, and piney notes. It's a parent of Queen's Sangria.

name: RS11
description: RS11 (also known as Rainbow Sherbert #11) from Wizard Trees has conquered the market with extremely high agronomic resilience and a dazzling terpene profile. It produces an unmistakable scent of tree fruit juice and gasoline. The high is sedating on the body but highly inspiring to the mind, which is why RS11 serves as a genetic foundation for countless modern hybrids.

name: Runtz
description: An extremely popular hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and candy-like aroma. The effect is euphoric, happy, and relaxing, making it a favorite for many.

name: Runtz Muffin
description: Runtz Muffin is a potent indica-dominant hybrid from Barney's Farm that combines the candy-like sweetness of Zkittlez and Gelato with a creamy orange-vanilla finish from Orange Punch. The effect is profoundly relaxing and long-lasting, washing over the user with a wave of euphoria that soothes stress and tension, eventually leading to a state of deep calm.

name: S.A.G.E.
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a spicy, sage-like aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing, ideal for daytime use.

name: Scotty 2 Hotty
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity, and slightly diesel-like aroma. The effect is relaxing, happy, and uplifting.

name: Scout's Honor
genetics: OGKB x OG Kush x Cherry Pie
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, earthy, and cherry-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and calming.

name: Secret Cookies
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, cookie-like, and cherry-like aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: Secret Weapon
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and slightly cheesy aroma. The effect is relaxing and uplifting, ideal for the late afternoon.

name: Sensi Star
description: Sensi Star is a legendary, multi-award-winning, indica-dominant strain whose exact genetics are a secret of the breeder Paradise Seeds, but it has a strong Afghani influence. It is known for its dense, extremely resinous buds and a unique aroma that combines citrus and metallic notes with an earthy, pungent undertone. The effect is strong, both physically relaxing and cerebrally stimulating, often described as a 'body stone with a head high'.

name: SFV OG
description: An OG Kush phenotype from the San Fernando Valley. Known for its earthy, piney, and citrusy aroma and an uplifting, creative effect.

name: Shaman
description: A robust Sativa developed for outdoor cultivation. It is mold-resistant and develops beautiful purple colors. The effect is uplifting and clear.

name: Sharksbreath
genetics: Great White Shark x Lamb's Bread

name: Sherb Bx
description: A backcross of the famous Sunset Sherbet, bred to stabilize and enhance its desirable traits. It has a sweet, fruity, and creamy aroma. The effect is relaxing and happy. Parent of Permanent Marker.

name: Sherbet
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, creamy, and fruity aroma. The effect is relaxing, happy, and stress-relieving.

name: Shishkaberry
description: Also known as 'Kish', Shishkaberry is a potent indica-dominant hybrid. It delivers a happy, blissful high that starts with a cerebral uplift before settling into a full-body relaxation. Its aroma is a delightful blend of sweet berries and earthy notes.

name: Shiva Skunk
description: A potent Indica named after the Hindu god. It combines the best qualities of its parents and offers a strongly relaxing effect.

name: SinMint Cookies
description: An indica-dominant strain with a minty, cookie-like, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and calming.

name: Skunk
genetics: Afghani x Acapulco Gold x Colombian Gold
description: Skunk (the original, pre-Skunk #1 selection) is one of the most important foundational cultivars in cannabis history. Developed by Sacred Seeds collective in the 1970s, it combined three landrace strains to create a stable, potent, reliably flowering hybrid. Nearly every modern strain carries some Skunk lineage.

name: Skunk #1
description: One of the most influential strains of all time. Known for its pungent, skunky aroma and its balanced, strong effect. The foundation for countless modern hybrids.

name: Skunk Haze
description: Skunk Haze by Mr Nice Seeds (bred by Shantibaba and Neville) combines the structure and reliability of Skunk #1 with the soaring, cerebral effects of Original Haze. It offers a balanced THC:CBD ratio in many phenos, making it suitable for both recreational and medicinal users.

name: Skywalker
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and berry-like aroma. The effect is relaxing, happy, and uplifting.

name: Skywalker OG
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with an earthy, piney, and diesel-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Slurricane
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity aroma of berries and grapes. The effect is strong, relaxing, and calming.

name: Slurty3
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and long-lasting.

name: Snoop's Dream
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, berry-like, and vanilla-like aroma. The effect is relaxing and euphoric.

name: Snow Lotus
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a complex aroma of earth, cherry, and hash. The effect is potent and deeply relaxing. It is a parent of Space Cake.

name: Snowman
description: A GSC phenotype with a sweet, vanilla-like, and diesel-like aroma. The effect is uplifting, euphoric, and creative.

name: Somango
genetics: Jack Herer x Super Skunk x Big Skunk Korean
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, tropical mango aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and relaxing.

name: Sour Apple
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sour apple and diesel aroma. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative.

name: Sour Bubble
description: A potent indica known for its sweet and sour candy-like aroma. The effect is strongly relaxing and sedative. It is a parent of Sour Dubble.

name: Sour Cream
description: Sour Cream is a sativa-dominant hybrid with a unique aroma combining sour diesel with creamy, cheesy notes. It provides a powerful, energetic, and focused high that is great for creative tasks and daytime activities. It is a parent of Aspen OG.

name: Sour Diesel
description: A legendary Sativa known for its pungent, diesel-like aroma. It offers a fast-acting, energizing, and dreamy cerebral effect, making it a favorite for daytime use.

name: Sour Dubb
description: Sour Dubb is a clone-only sativa-dominant hybrid combining Sour Diesel with Sour Bubble genetics. It gained fame as one of the three parent strains of Gorilla Glue #4 (GG4). It delivers a potent, diesel-forward flavor with energizing, creative effects.

name: Sour Dubble
description: A balanced hybrid with a sour, fruity, and diesel-like aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: Sour Kush
description: A balanced hybrid with a sour, diesel-like, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, balanced between cerebral euphoria and physical relaxation.

name: Sour Tangie
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a strong citrus and orange aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing.

name: Sour Tsunami
description: Sour Tsunami by Southern Humboldt Seed Collective was one of the first high-CBD strains deliberately bred in the United States. Created by Lawrence Ringo, it helped pioneer the medical CBD movement. Provides relief from pain and inflammation without significant psychoactive effects.

name: South Florida OG
genetics: Chemdawg x (Lemon Thai x Hindu Kush)
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with an earthy, piney, and pungent aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and long-lasting.

name: Space Cake
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, creamy, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and euphoric.

name: Space Queen
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and pineapple-like aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing.

name: Spritzer
genetics: Runtz x Grape Pie x MAC
description: Cannarado Genetics' Spritzer unites three of the most iconic breeding lines into an uncompromising candy experience. The extremely volatile terpenes create a pure sugar taste completely free of earthy or heavy gasoline notes. The strain has a strongly stimulating, motivating effect ideal for creative work, hikes, or daydreaming.

name: Stardawg
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a strong, chemical, and diesel-like aroma. The effect is uplifting, euphoric, and creative.

name: Starfighter
genetics: Alien Tahoe OG x Lemon Alien Dawg

name: Strawberry Banana
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity aroma of strawberries and bananas. The effect is strong, relaxing, and happy.

name: Strawberry Cough
description: A Sativa strain known for its sweet strawberry aroma and its uplifting, cerebral effect that often encourages contemplation. Ideal for social occasions.

name: Strawberry Diesel
description: Strawberry Diesel is a potent 50/50 hybrid combining the fuel-forward pungency of NYC Diesel with the sweet berry notes of Strawberry Cough. The result is a complex flavor profile and a balanced high that offers both cerebral stimulation and body relaxation.

name: Strawberry Fields
description: An indica strain from Vermont known for its intensely sweet strawberry aroma and flavor. The effect is relaxing and happy. It is the key parent of Strawberry Cough.

name: Strawberry Gary
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity strawberry aroma. The effect is relaxing, happy, and uplifting.

name: Strawberry Kush
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet strawberry aroma. The effect is relaxing and calming, ideal for evening use.

name: Sugar Black Rose
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, fruity, and floral aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Sundae Driver
genetics: Fruity Pebbles OG x Grape Pie
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, creamy, and fruity aroma. The effect is relaxing, happy, and stress-relieving.

name: Sunset Sherbet
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and creamy aroma. The effect is relaxing, happy, and uplifting.

name: Super Critical
genetics: Big Bud x Skunk #1 x White Widow
description: An indica-dominant strain known for its extremely high yields and fast flowering time. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Super Glue
description: Super Glue is an indica-dominant hybrid known for its deeply relaxing and calming effects. It produces a sense of tranquility that melts away stress and pain, while retaining a touch of cerebral clarity. The aroma is primarily pine and earthy notes.

name: Super Lemon Haze
genetics: Lemon Skunk x Super Silver Haze
description: A multiple Cannabis Cup winner known for its intense lemon aroma and its energizing, creative effect. A classic Sativa for daytime use.

name: Super Silver Haze
genetics: Skunk x Northern Lights x Haze
description: An award-winning Sativa with a spicy, citrusy, and earthy aroma. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and long-lasting.

name: Super Skunk
description: A further development of Skunk #1, known for its even more intense skunk aroma and its strong, relaxing effect.

name: Swazi Gold
description: A robust and resinous Sativa landrace from Eswatini (formerly Swaziland) in Southern Africa. It is known for its resilient nature and a strongly uplifting, energetic, and happy effect. The aroma is sweet and tropical, often with notes of mango.

name: Swazi Landrace
description: A pure sativa landrace from Eswatini (formerly Swaziland). It is the genetic basis for Swazi Gold and is known for its resilient nature and an uplifting, energetic high.

name: Sweet Skunk
genetics: Skunk #1 x an unknown sweet Indica

name: Sweet Tooth
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, berry-like, and fruity aroma. The effect is relaxing and happy.

name: Tahoe Alien
genetics: Tahoe OG Kush x Alien Kush
description: An indica-dominant strain with an earthy, piney, and lemony aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and ideal for the evening.

name: Tahoe OG
description: Tahoe OG is a potent indica-dominant OG Kush phenotype named after Lake Tahoe. Known for its fast-acting, heavy sedation that makes it one of the strongest OG variants. It delivers an earthy, lemon, and pine flavor profile. A staple in dispensaries across the West Coast.

name: Tahoe OG Kush
description: An OG Kush phenotype known for its heavily relaxing and sedating effects. Ideal for evening use and for insomnia.

name: Tangerine Dream
genetics: G13 x Afghani x Neville's A5 Haze
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, tangerine-like aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and pain-relieving.

name: Tangie
description: A Sativa strain known for its strong, sweet tangerine aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing, ideal for daytime use.

name: Tangilope
description: A sativa-dominant strain that combines the citrus aroma of Tangie with the chocolatey taste of Chocolope. The effect is uplifting and creative.

name: Tegridy OG
description: Named after the fictional farm in the TV show "South Park," Tegridy OG is a potent indica-dominant hybrid for experienced users. It typically combines classic OG Kush and Chemdawg genetics, resulting in a powerful aroma of earth, pine, and pungent diesel. The effects are strong and fast-acting, delivering a wave of cerebral euphoria that quickly transitions into a heavy, full-body relaxation that can lead to couch-lock. It's an ideal strain for evening use, stress relief, and managing pain.

name: Thai
description: The archetypal Sativa and genetic foundation for countless modern strains, especially the Haze family.

name: Thai Stick
description: The Thai landrace, historically known as Thai Stick, is one of the most influential sativas in the world. It provided the fundamental genetics for the entire Haze family and countless modern cerebral hybrids. Its growth pattern is expansive and slender, while its terpene profile is defined by sharp, earthy lemon and produces a rapidly onset, almost boundlessly energetic high.

name: THC Bomb
genetics: Big Bud x Pure Power Plant
description: A potent hybrid known for its extremely high yields and high THC content. The effect is strong, relaxing, and euphoric.

name: The Cleaner
genetics: Lamb's Bread x Pluton x Purple Haze

name: The Creature
description: The Creature is a highly potent and mysterious indica-dominant strain, rumored to have emerged from OG Kush genetics. It's known for its monstrously dense, resin-caked buds and a pungent, gassy aroma. The effects are heavy and sedating, providing a powerful body stone. It is a parent of the acclaimed Chimera #2.

name: The Menthol
genetics: Gelato 45 x (White Diesel x (High Octane x Jet Fuel))
description: A unique hybrid known for its distinctively sharp, minty, and chemical aroma, reminiscent of menthol. The high is balanced, offering an uplifting and creative cerebral buzz followed by a soothing body calm.

name: The Original
description: An indica-dominant strain with an earthy, piney, and spicy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and ideal for the evening.

name: The Power
description: A fast-flowering sativa known for its uplifting and energetic high. It is a parent of Blue Power.

name: The Soap
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a unique floral, minty, and 'clean' aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing.

name: The White
description: The White is a potent, clone-only hybrid of unknown origin, named for the thick layer of white trichomes that covers its buds. Despite its frosty appearance, it has a surprisingly subtle aroma of earth, pine, and diesel. The effect is a powerful, balanced high that starts with cerebral clarity and settles into a comfortable body relaxation. It is a prized parent for breeding due to its high resin production.

name: The Wife
description: A very high-CBD hemp strain known for its calming and therapeutic effects with no psychoactive high. The aroma is a mix of cherry and earthy notes. It is a parent of Cherry Wine and Trophy Wife.

name: The Y
description: Also known as Y-Griega or Y-Life, The Y is a potent hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and diesel-like aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing. It's a parent of the famous Gary Payton strain.

name: Thin Mint GSC
description: A GSC phenotype with a minty, sweet, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, balanced between cerebral euphoria and physical relaxation.

name: Think Tank
description: Think Tank has generated immense attention in the extraction industry through extremely high, lab-verified THC readings up to an exorbitant 41%. The strain magnificently balances the dense, savory doughiness of Wedding Cake with sharp Lemon Tree citrus fruit. The mentally incredibly focusing high is accompanied by a warm, functional body sensation.

name: Three Kings
genetics: Headband x Sour Diesel x OG Kush
description: A sativa-dominant strain bred from three legendary strains. It offers a balanced, uplifting, and creative effect. The aroma is a mix of pine, earth, and diesel.

name: Timewreck
description: Timewreck is a potent sativa-dominant hybrid from Subcool's The Dank, known for its intense and almost psychedelic cerebral high. The aroma is a sharp mix of sour, fruity, and earthy notes. It is a parent of Quantum Kush.

name: Tiramisu
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, creamy, and coffee-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Toad Venom
description: Toad Venom is considered one of the most coveted and mystical hype strains of 2026. Developed by West Coast Connoisseurs, the plant features optically frog-skin-reminiscent, purple-green, extremely resinous flowers. The complex aroma mixing fresh mint, sharp gasoline, and sweet peach rings leads to a profoundly centering, creative yet physically calm mental experience.

name: Tom Ford Pink Kush
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a sweet, floral, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Top 44
description: Top 44 by Nirvana Seeds is named for its remarkably fast flowering time of approximately 44 days. This indica-dominant strain is a favorite among commercial growers for its speed and reliability. It delivers a mild, relaxing body high with a sweet and skunky flavor profile.

name: Trainwreck
description: A potent Sativa that produces a fast-acting, intense, and euphoric effect. The aroma is a mix of pine, lemon, and spicy notes.

name: Tres Dawg
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a strong, chemical, and diesel-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and long-lasting.

name: Triangle Kush
description: Triangle Kush is a legendary and highly potent indica strain originating from Florida, named after the state's three major cannabis-producing cities: Jacksonville, Miami, and Tampa. Believed to be a direct descendant or a very close phenotype of the original OG Kush, it is considered a cornerstone of many modern Kush and OG varieties. The effect is powerful and balanced, starting with an uplifting cerebral rush that sparks creativity and conversation, before settling into a deep, full-body relaxation that can effectively manage pain and stress without being completely incapacitating. Its aroma is a classic and complex OG profile, dominated by notes of spicy fuel, earthy pine, and sour lemon.

name: Triangle Mints
description: A balanced hybrid with a minty, earthy, and sweet aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: Trinity
description: Trinity is a legendary, fast-flowering sativa-dominant strain from Northern California. It's known for its complex, pungent aroma of earth, skunk, and pine. The high is typically clear-headed, energetic, and long-lasting. It is a parent of Qrazy Train.

name: Triple OG
genetics: OG Kush x SFV OG x Triangle Kush
description: A potent indica that combines three OG Kush lines. It has an earthy, piney, and spicy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Trophy Wife
description: While often known as a high-CBD strain, Trophy Wife also has high-THC phenotypes that are used for breeding. This version offers a balanced, relaxing high with a sweet and earthy cherry aroma. It is a parent of the popular Point Break strain.

name: Tropic Truffle
genetics: Tropicana Cookies x Mint Chocolate Chip
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, citrusy orange aroma combined with minty and chocolatey undertones. The effect is energetic, uplifting, and creative, making it a great choice for daytime use and social activities.

name: Tropical Punch
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a sweet, tropical aroma of pineapple and fruity punch. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative.

name: Tropical Runtz
description: A potent hybrid with a sweet, fruity aroma of tropical fruits and pineapple. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: Tropicana Cherry
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity aroma of cherries and citrus. The effect is uplifting, happy, and relaxing.

name: Tropicana Cookies
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a strong orange and citrus aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing.

name: Truffle Butter
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, buttery, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Tutankhamon
description: An AK-47 phenotype with an extremely high THC content. The effect is strong, cerebral, and energizing. The aroma is skunky and fruity.

name: Tutankhamon x Runtz
description: Pyramid Seeds crossed their indestructible house stability legend Tutankhamon with the extremely trendy Runtz. The result is a robust hybrid combining classic agronomic stability (thick stems, enormous resistance) with the highly coveted sugar sweetness of the US West Coast. Ideal for growers who want to cultivate modern terpenes without any yield losses.

name: UK Cheese
description: A legendary hybrid strain that originated in the United Kingdom. It is a phenotype of Skunk #1 and is famous for its distinct, pungent, cheesy aroma. UK Cheese offers a balanced high that begins with an energetic, euphoric rush and settles into a relaxing body stone, making it suitable for managing stress and pain throughout the day.

name: Unicorn Poop
description: A balanced hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and earthy aroma. The effect is relaxing, happy, and uplifting.

name: V-Kush
description: An indica-dominant strain with an earthy, piney, and pungent aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Vader OG
genetics: SFV OG Kush x Larry OG
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with an earthy, sweet, and grape-like aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and sedating.

name: Vanilla Kush
description: An indica-dominant strain with a sweet, vanilla-like, and lavender-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and calming.

name: Velvet Glove
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a diesel-like, earthy, and pungent aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and long-lasting.

name: Venom OG
description: An indica-dominant strain with an earthy, skunky, and diesel-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: Violator Kush
description: A pure Indica with an earthy, spicy, and pungent aroma. The effect is strong, physically relaxing, and sedating, ideal for pain and insomnia.

name: Vortex
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid from Subcool's The Dank, known for its intense, almost psychedelic cerebral high. It has a sweet and sour aroma of lemon and tropical fruit. It is a parent of Timewreck.

name: Wappa
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, fruity, and skunky aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and happy, ideal for the evening.

name: Wedding Cake
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, vanilla-like, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and euphoric, ideal for the evening.

name: Wedding Crasher
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a sweet, grape-like, and vanilla-like aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and social.

name: White Castle
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with an earthy, sweet, and strawberry-like aroma. The effect is relaxing and calming.

name: White Dawg
description: A balanced hybrid with a strong, diesel-like, and earthy aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing.

name: White Fire Alien OG
genetics: The White x Fire Alien Kush

name: White Rhino
genetics: White Widow x North American Indica
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid with an earthy, woody, and sweet aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: White Runtz
description: A phenotype of Runtz, known for its extremely frosty appearance with a thick coat of white trichomes. The aroma is sweet and fruity, like candy. The effect is strong, long-lasting, and balanced between euphoric stimulation and relaxing calm.

name: White Train Haze
description: A potent sativa-dominant strain with a complex aroma of lemon, pine, and spice. It delivers a strong, energetic, and euphoric high that is great for creativity and focus.

name: White Truffle
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with a savory, earthy aroma reminiscent of truffles and garlic. The effect is quick-hitting, providing a cerebral buzz that settles into a relaxing body high.

name: White Widow
genetics: Brazilian Sativa Landrace x South Indian Indica
description: One of the most famous strains worldwide. A balanced hybrid with an earthy, woody, and spicy aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and energizing.

name: Whitethorn Rose
description: From Huckleberry Hill Farms, Whitethorn Rose has achieved absolute legendary status through its unparalleled suitability for solventless extraction (multiple Emerald Cup winner). Its deep purple flowers exude an insane blend of fine lavender, sweet cream, and citrus. The high is highly motivating, stabilizes focus, and dissolves tension phenomenally gently.

name: Whitewalker OG
genetics: The White x SFV OG Kush
description: A potent indica-dominant strain with an earthy, piney, and diesel-like aroma. The effect is strong, relaxing, and sedating.

name: WiFi OG
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with an earthy, pungent, and sour aroma. The effect is uplifting, creative, and energizing.

name: William's Wonder
description: A classic, old-school indica known for high yields and potent, relaxing effects. It's a key parent of the original Lowryder and Blue Magoo.

name: Wonder Woman
description: A sativa-dominant strain known for its extremely high yields and sweet, skunky aroma. The effect is uplifting and creative.

name: Wookie #15
genetics: The White x Girl Scout Cookies
description: Wookie #15 is a potent indica-dominant hybrid, famous for its unique aroma profile that blends lavender, mint, and diesel. It provides a happy, relaxing high that soothes the body while keeping the mind euphoric. It is a parent of Monkey Glue.

name: WU-5
description: A CBD-rich strain with an earthy, herbal, and sweet aroma. The effect is mild, clear, and functional, ideal for medical users.

name: Xanadu
description: A well-balanced hybrid strain known for its euphoric and uplifting effects that gently transition into relaxation. It has a sweet, fruity aroma with floral and earthy undertones, making it a pleasant choice for managing stress and improving mood.

name: Xeno
description: A potent and flavorful hybrid strain that offers a balanced high. It combines the minty, diesel notes of Kush Mints with the sweet, fruity candy flavor of Zkittlez. The effect is both euphoric and relaxing, perfect for any time of day.

name: XJ-13
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid praised for its therapeutic qualities and paranoia-free cerebral effects. It delivers a clear-headed, creative, and focused high, making it excellent for daytime use. The aroma is a delightful mix of lemon, pine, and sweet spice.

name: XXX OG
description: A potent indica-dominant strain that is a three-time Cannabis Cup winner. It provides a heavy, relaxing body high that is great for pain and insomnia. The aroma is classic OG: earthy, piney, and pungent. It is a parent of Godfather OG.

name: Ya Hemi
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid with a strong, fruity aroma underscored by gassy and earthy notes. Ya Hemi provides a potent, euphoric, and creative high that's perfect for daytime use, keeping you energized and focused.

name: Yeti OG
genetics: OG Kush x an unknown strain
description: An indica-dominant hybrid with a classic OG aroma of earth, pine, and diesel. Yeti OG delivers a heavy, relaxing body high that is excellent for relieving pain and stress, often leading to a sleepy state.

name: Yumboldt
description: An old-school indica landrace from Humboldt County, California. It offers a deeply relaxing and calming high with a sweet, earthy aroma reminiscent of hash and berries. A great choice for a classic, soothing indica experience.

name: Zashimi
description: An indica-dominant hybrid that boasts a complex sweet and fruity flavor profile with berry undertones. Zashimi provides a strong, relaxing, and calming high, making it an excellent choice for evening use.

name: Zen
genetics: Medicine Man x an unknown CBD-rich strain
description: A high-CBD strain with a balanced THC and CBD content. Zen provides a mild, clear-headed, and functional effect, making it ideal for medical users seeking relief without significant psychoactivity.

name: Zkittlez
genetics: Grape Ape x Grapefruit x Unknown Strain
description: An award-winning, indica-dominant hybrid famous for its extremely sweet, fruity, and candy-like aroma, reminiscent of the popular candy. The effect is surprisingly uplifting for an indica, leaving you focused, alert, and happy while relaxing the body.

name: Zkittlez Cake
description: A potent indica-dominant strain that combines the sweet, fruity candy flavor of Zkittlez with the creamy, cake-like notes of Wedding Cake. The effect is strong, relaxing, and euphoric.

name: Zoap
genetics: (Rainbow Sherbet x Pink Guava) x F2 Pheno 21
description: A balanced hybrid with a unique sweet, fruity, and soapy floral aroma. The effect is strong, euphoric, and relaxing, providing a happy and giggly high that soothes the body.

name: Zour Apples
description: A sativa-dominant strain with a pungent sour apple and diesel aroma. The effect is uplifting, energizing, and creative, making it a great choice for daytime use.
